1000635856.english: Yes. As rivals acknowledged by the Commander himself, they will face him in a fierce battle…!
1000635856.korean: 그래. 사령관이 인정한 호적수로서, 치열한 대결을 펼치게 된다...!

1000635859.english: I knew you'd come, Captain Arsenal.

1000635860.english: I couldn't miss a conversation like this.
1000635860.korean: 이런 이야기를 하는데에 내가 빠질 순 없지.

1000635861.english: You confident? I doubled my training time for this chance, so I won't be foolishly defeated like last time.
1000635861.korean: 자신 있다 이건가? 나도 이번 기회를 위해 단련 시간을 두 배로 늘렸으니까, 저번처럼 어이없이 당하지는 않을 거야.

1000635862.english: Hmm. You're thinking about it the wrong way.

1000635864.korean: 비결은 육체의 강인함 같은 것이 아니다.

1000635866.english: No way. You can't hold out just by steeling your mind.
1000635866.korean: 설마. 그런 건 정신을 똑바로 차린다고 버틸 수 있는 게 아니야.

1000635867.english: I didn't explain well. Precisely, everything...

1000635868.english: The mindset to enjoy the time, the space, and everything you do with your opponent. That's the key.
1000635868.korean: 그 시간, 그 공간, 상대방과 행하는 모든 것을 즐기려는 마음가짐. 그게 바로 열쇠다.

1000635869.english: No matter how hard you try, you can't beat someone who's enjoying it.
1000635869.korean: 아무리 노력해봤자, 즐기는 자를 이길 수 있을리 없으니까.

1000635871.english: And your premise is wrong from the start. Since when did making love between a man and a woman become a contest?
1000635871.korean: 그리고 전제부터가 잘못되었다. 언제부터 남녀가 사랑을 나누는 것이 승부가 됐지?

1000635872.english: That's... that Captain Arsenal is supposedly the only one who hasn't been defeated by the Commander...
1000635872.korean: 그건... 아스널 대장만이 유일하게 사령관에게 패배하지 않았다고...

1000635873.english: I never once said that myself, though?
1000635873.korean: 나는 내 입으로 그런 말을 한 적은 한 번도 없다만?

1000635875.english: Men and women love each other with all their strength and build affection. That's all there is to it.
1000635875.korean: 남녀가 힘 닿는 데까지 서로를 사랑하고, 정을 쌓아간다. 그저 그뿐이다.

1000635876.english: No matter what other adjectives you tack on, they won't mean anything.
1000635876.korean: 다른 형용사를 아무리 붙여봐야 의미 따윈 없지.

1000635877.english: What on earth have I been... all this time...

1000635878.english: It's not too late. Now that you've realized it was wrong, just correct it.
1000635878.korean: 아직 늦지 않았다. 잘못된 것을 알았으니, 이제 고치기만 하면 된다.

1000635880.english: Love the Commander with all your heart, and be loved in return. That's all I can tell you.
1000635880.korean: 혼신의 힘을 다해 사령관을 사랑하고, 사랑 받아라. 내가 해줄 수 있는 말은 이게 전부다.

1000635882.english: Commander, would you like to see? I was inspired by the way you spoke!
1000635882.korean: 대장님, 한 번 보시겠어요? 대장님이 말씀하시는 모습에서 영감을 받았거든요!

1000635883.english: Hmm... this is excellent. Doesn't it look like a halo is shining from me?
1000635883.korean: 흐음... 이건 훌륭하군. 마치 내게서 후광이 비추는 것 같지 않나.

1000635884.english: I expressed exactly what I felt. Hehe, I'll give it to you as a present.
1000635884.korean: 제가 느낀 그대로를 표현했어요. 헤헷, 선물로 드릴게요.

1000635885.english: Thank you. As a return favor, how about joining our unit's next gathering with the Commander?
1000635885.korean: 고맙군. 답례라고 하기엔 뭐하지만, 다음번 우리 부대와 사령관의 모임에 자네도 오겠나?

1000635891.english: Still not used to conversations like this? It's not good to hold back too much.
1000635891.korean: 아직 이런 대화는 익숙하지 않은가? 너무 빼는건 안좋은데.

1000635895.english: If you fall into his arms, pain, sorrow, loneliness, anguish—all those emotions are summed up by a single word: love.
1000635895.korean: 그에게 안기면 고통, 슬픔, 외로움, 번뇌 등등... 그 모든 감정들이 사랑이라는 단어 하나로 정리된다.

1000635896.english: When your mind is troubled, when you're mentally exhausted, when you want comfort, or when you're bored, knock on his door. He will always welcome you.
1000635896.korean: 마음이 복잡하거나, 정신적으로 힘들거나, 위로받고 싶거나, 심심할 때는 그의 방문을 두드려라. 그는 자네를 언제든 환영해줄거야.

1000635897.english: Hehe, thank you for the kind words. I'll remember that.
1000635897.korean: 후후, 좋은 말씀 고마워요. 기억해 둘게요.

1000635899.english: ...But there's one thing I want to ask.

1000635901.english: Among the Commander's desires you saw, was there anything useful? I'd like to take note.
1000635901.korean: 자네가 본 사령관의 욕망 중에, 쓸만한 것이 있었나? 참고해보고 싶군.

1000635903.english: Heh heh, did you think you'd toppled him with just this much?!
1000635903.korean: 큭큭, 고작 이정도로 쓰러뜨린 줄 알았나!

1000635905.english: Then go ahead. Ten times, a hundred times—it's fine.
1000635905.korean: 그럼. 열 번이든 백 번이든 해도 돼.

1000635906.english: So what. The past is the past.

1000635907.english: Don't teach too rigidly; you can modify it and show a variation.
1000635907.korean: 너무 정석대로 가르치지 말고, 적당히 변형해서 알려줘도 돼.

1000635911.english: We might need to egg them on a bit more...

1000635912.english: You said you had an idea, didn't you?

1000635913.english: Yeah. I'll take one lap around. Wanna come—
1000635913.korean: 응. 한 바퀴 둘러보려고. 같이 갈-

1000635928.english: Aren't they all being a little too enthusiastic?

1000635929.english: Yeah. Maybe we should try to rein them in a bit?
1000635929.korean: 응. 아무래도 조금 자제시키는 게 좋지 않을까?

1000635933.english: Wait. Calm down. That's not it...

1000635936.english: Veronica, I've been curious about something for a while.

1000635937.english: Why is it that wearing underwear is not allowed? Is there a specific reason?
1000635937.korean: 왜 속옷을 입으면 안된다는거야? 따로 이유가 있나?

1000635940.english: After all, the most important thing is the situation before our eyes right now...
1000635940.korean: 결국 가장 중요한 건 바로 지금, 눈으로 보는 상황이지...

1000635947.english: Then good work. See you later.

1000635949.english: Really? I didn't notice anything particularly strange.

1000635951.english: Sorry. There's something I need to talk about with just the two of you.
1000635951.korean: 미안. 단 둘이 이야기해야 할 일이 있어서.

1000635952.english: Alright, alright. Let's stay together for now.
1000635952.korean: 알았어, 알았어. 이제 계속 같이 있자.

1000635955.english: No, this isn't the time. Later, later...
1000635955.korean: 아니, 이럴 때가 아니야. 나중에, 나중에...

1000635962.english: You don't have to worry so much. Please go prepare for the event with the others...
1000635962.korean: 그렇게 걱정해주지 않으셔도 돼요. 다른 분들이랑 같이 행사 준비 하러 가세요...

1000635964.english: Dryad, are you feeling a bit better?

1000635966.english: This is a big problem. Of all times, getting sick at a time like this...

1000635967.english: ...I'm sorry. Because of me, none of us were able to gather the talents.
1000635967.korean: ...죄송해요. 저 때문에 저희 전부 다 달란트를 모으지 못하게 됐어요.

1000635968.english: No, no, that's fine. I'll do my best to make it work somehow.
1000635968.korean: 아뇨아뇨, 그건 괜찮아요. 제가 어떻게든 힘 써볼게요.

1000635969.english: The problem isn't that... it's Titania.

1000635972.english: That's right. You heard that the Master is trying to restore all the members who were pushed down the priority list lately as he works to boost his forces, right?
1000635972.korean: 그래요. 요즘 주인님께서 전력을 증강하시느라, 우선 순위에서 밀렸던 대원들을 전부 복원하려하시는 건 들었죠?

1000635973.english: But, still, Titania is too... dangerous.
1000635973.korean: 그, 그래도 티타니아 언니는 너무... 위험해요.

1000635974.english: The hatred and anger are so deep that there will likely be limits to how much can be manipulated during the restoration.
1000635974.korean: 워낙 증오와 분노가 깊어서 복원 중에 조작하기에도 한계가 있을 거예요.

1000635975.english: That is why I came to tell you. We fairies must join forces to prevent Titania from being restored.
1000635975.korean: 그래서 그걸 말하러 온 거에요. 저희 페어리들이 힘을 합해서, 티타니아가 복원되지 못하도록 막아야 해요.

1000635976.english: Th-that's right. If you're not careful, even you, Master, could be harmed by that frost...
1000635976.korean: 그, 그래요. 자칫하다간 그 서릿발에 주인님도 해를 입으실수도...

1000635978.english: ...because I cannot stand by and watch my twin sister suffer again.
1000635978.korean: ...제 쌍둥이 자매가, 또다시 고통 받는 건 두고 볼 수 없으니까요.

1000635980.english: That's right. I also... to my master...

1000635981.english: Hmm, no. Daphne stays with the Dryad.
1000635981.korean: 음, 아니에요. 다프네는 드리아드랑 같이 있어줘요.

1000635982.english: I'll take Aqua and Rize with me for now.

1000635985.english: Your older sister will take good care of it. Dryad, get some good rest.
1000635985.korean: 언니가 잘 해결해 주실거야. 드리아드는 푹 쉬어.

1000635987.english: Ah, Rize. Rhea was looking for you...
1000635987.korean: 아, 리제 언니. 레아 언니가 찾으셨는데...

1000635991.english: Are you really sick? You're just doing this to get your master's attention!
1000635991.korean: 진짜 아픈 거 맞아? 주인님의 관심을 받으려고 그러는 거지!

1000635993.english: Oh, no... I really just keep having a fever... and keep...
1000635993.korean: 아, 아니에요... 진짜로 몸에서 계속 열이나고... 계속...

1000635994.english: Hmph. Do you think a bioroid would catch a cold or the flu?
1000635994.korean: 흥. 바이오로이드가 감기나 몸살에 걸릴 것 같아?

1000635999.english: It's probably not a cold or the flu, but I've had a fever for a while now.
1000635999.korean: 감기나 몸살은 아니겠지만, 얼마전부터 계속 열이나서요.

1000636000.english: I have asked Dr. Yang to perform a thorough examination.
1000636000.korean: 닥터 양에게 정밀 검사를 부탁해 뒀어요.

1000636001.english: Dryad's face was certainly flushed, and her breath was hot.
1000636001.korean: - 확실히 드리아드는 얼굴이 발갛고, 숨이 뜨거웠다.

1000636002.english: I can feel the heat immediately when I place my hand on my forehead.
1000636002.korean: - 이마에 손을 얹어보니 금방 느껴질 정도로 열이 있다.

1000636004.english: Master's hand... it's cool, so it feels good...

1000636009.english: With a bright red face, Rize silently nodded vigorously and sat down on the bed.
1000636009.korean: - 새빨개진 얼굴로 말없이 고개만 세차게 끄덕인 리제가 침대에 걸터앉았다.

1000636010.english: I'll put a wet towel on for you.

1000636012.english: I, I'm not ashamed of things like that anymore...

1000636013.english: After the forehead kiss incident in Paradise, Rize was busy avoiding me whenever she saw me.
1000636013.korean: - 낙원에서의 이마 키스 사건 뒤에, 리제는 나를 보면 피하기 바빴다.

1000636014.english: I adjusted it appropriately considering Rize's defense, but I didn't expect it to be this much...
1000636014.korean: - 리제의 방어력을 고려해서 적당히 조절했는데도 이정도일줄은 몰랐는걸...

1000636015.english: This is the first time I've seen you so demure, too.
1000636015.korean: 저도 언니의 저런 얌전한 모습은 처음봐요.

1000636019.english: Rize, who was wiping Dryad's face with a blank look in her eyes, dropped the wet towel when our eyes met.
1000636019.korean: - 멍한 눈으로 드리아드의 얼굴을 닦아주다 나와 눈이 마주친 리제가 물수건을 털썩 떨어트렸다.

1000636020.english: It’s just because it’s the first time you’ve felt that sensation, but you’ll get used to it soon. Me too—
1000636020.korean: 처음으로 느껴본 자극 때문에 그렇지, 금방 익숙해질 거예요. 저도-

1000636022.english: This—this is just my opinion as the medical officer of the Orca. I have no other intentions.
1000636022.korean: 이, 이건 오르카 호의 의료 담당으로서의 의견이에요. 다른 뜻은 없어요.

1000636023.english: He gently ruffled Daphne's hair, who was blushing to herself, wondering what she was thinking.
1000636023.korean: - 무슨 생각을 했는지 혼자 얼굴을 붉히는 다프네의 머리카락을 살짝 흐트러트려 주었다.

1000636024.english: By the way... are you leaving?

1000636025.english: I decided to take Hirume out for a walk, as she must have felt stifled having been stuck inside the Orca ship for months.
1000636025.korean: - 몇 달 동안 줄곧 오르카 호 함내에만 있어서 답답할 히루메를 데리고 산책겸 나갔다 오기로 했다.

1000636026.english: If you leave now... you won't be back until midnight, will you?

1000636028.english: Hey, has your fever gone down a bit?

1000636030.english: The breeze feels nice and cool.

1000636031.english: Early evening, as dusk was starting to fall, we reached a spot where distant peaks could be seen.
1000636031.korean: - 초저녁, 슬슬 어둑해지는 시간에 멀리 봉우리가 보이는 지점에 다다랐다.

1000636032.english: It's been a while since I got some fresh air...

1000636033.english: I used to go out at midnight and wander around. I'd wash up and look around here and there. It really is spacious.
1000636033.korean: 한밤중에 나와서 돌아다니기도 했느니라. 씻기도 하고, 이곳저곳 둘러보기도 했지. 정말로 넓더구나.

1000636035.english: Look at my tail and hair. It wouldn't take just an hour or two to wash them.
1000636035.korean: 첩의 꼬리와 머리카락을 보거라. 씻으려면 한 두시간으로 될 것이 아니다.

1000636036.english: In fact, I'd heard that members with long, thick hair like Charlotte, Mei, and Miho cut into their sleep time to care for it.
1000636036.korean: - 실제로 샬럿이나 메이, 미호같이 머리카락이 길고 풍성한 대원들은 자는 시간까지 줄여가며 관리 한다고 들었다.

1000636037.english: No matter how much you use a secluded bathroom... sometimes someone would come in while someone was mid-shower.
1000636037.korean: 아무리 구석진 곳의 욕실을 사용하더라도... 가끔 한참 씻는 중에 누군가 들어오는 경우가 있었다.

1000636038.english: Even with heightened security, no one would suspect a person calmly showering in the bathhouse.
1000636038.korean: - 아무리 경계가 강화된 상태라고 해도 샤워실에서 태연하게 씻고 있는 사람을 의심할 대원은 없겠지.

1000636039.english: The members don't all know each other's faces, either...
1000636039.korean: - 대원들끼리 전부 얼굴을 아는건 아니기도 하고...

1000636040.english: Ah, and there's something I want to ask.
1000636040.korean: 아, 그리고 물어보고 싶은 것이 있다.

1000636041.english: Wouldn't an exorcism ritual be necessary? I'm confident I can handle it.
1000636041.korean: 혹시 제령 의식이 필요하지 않느냐? 첩은 자신 있다만.

1000636042.english: I heard you clearly. Walking the night corridor, there wasn't a day when you wouldn't hear chilling screams coming from the corners.
1000636042.korean: 똑똑히 들었다. 밤의 복도를 걷다 보면, 구석진 곳에서부터 소름끼치는 비명 소리가 들리지 않는 날이 없었다.

1000636043.english: Hehe, isn't that a relief? I'm not afraid of wandering spirits of the living world.
1000636043.korean: 후후, 다행이지 않느냐? 첩은 이승을 떠도는 망자들 따위 두렵지 않다.

1000636044.english: Don't decline. With my radiance, I can send those hitchhiking fiends back to the afterlife in an instant.
1000636044.korean: 사양하지 말거라. 첩의 광휘라면 잡귀따위 순식간에 저승으로 돌려보낼 수 있다.

1000636046.english: On a slightly different note, members with animal genes mixed in, like Companions, are easy to read.
1000636046.korean: - 조금 다른 얘기지만, 컴패니언처럼 동물 유전자가 섞인 대원들은 속마음을 파악하기 편하다.

1000636047.english: Honest members like Hachiko, Poi, and Fenrir need no mention, and even quiet members like Perrault, Snow Feather cannot hide the subtle movements of their ears, tails, and pupils.
1000636047.korean: - 하치코, 포이, 펜리르처럼 솔직한 대원들은 말할 것도 없고, 페로나 스노우 페더처럼 조용한 대원들도 귀, 꼬리, 눈동자의 미묘한 움직임을 숨기지 못하니까.

1000636048.english: Right now Hirume's ears are twitching slightly, and his tail is gently swaying.
1000636048.korean: - 지금 히루메의 귀는 미세하게 쫑긋거리고, 꼬리는 부드럽게 살랑거린다.

1000636049.english: Based on my experience and the crash-course knowledge of the past few days, Hirume is...
1000636049.korean: - 내 경험과 요 며칠간 벼락치기한 지식에 의거했을때, 히루메는...

1000636051.english: You can't exactly call that wrong. I... have not properly served a master before.
1000636051.korean: 틀린 말이라고는 할 수 없구나. 첩은... 제대로 주인을 섬겨보지 못했으니 말이다.

1000636053.english: ...So then. About what you said last time. I— I, you...
1000636053.korean: ...그래서 말이다. 저번에 그대가 했던 말 있지 않느냐. 첩은, 그대를...

1000636054.english: Ah, no... If you should need me... I-I will consider it.
1000636054.korean: 아, 아니... 그대가 첩을 필요로 해준다면... 고, 고려는 해보겠다.

1000636055.english: You said you'd "consider"! You didn't say you agreed!
1000636055.korean: 고려해보겠다고 하지 않았느냐! 승낙한다고는 하지 않았다!

1000636056.english: With a squeal, Hirume didn't try to pull away from my hand stroking his head.
1000636056.korean: - 빼액 소리지르면서도 히루메는 머리를 쓰다듬는 내 손을 치우려 하지 않았다.

1000636057.english: What are you saying! You really are inscrutable!
1000636057.korean: 무슨 말을 하는 것이냐! 그대는 정말 알다가도 모르겠구나!

1000636060.english: I, I see. So you plan to lead me to answer that way, make me think I like you, and then...
1000636060.korean: 그, 그렇구나. 그런 식으로 대답을 유도해서, 첩이 그대를 좋아한다고 생각하게 만든 다음...

1000636061.english: Make me... make me... your bride!
1000636061.korean: 첩을... 첩을... 그, 그대의 신부로 삼으려는 게지!

1000636063.english: Maybe lost for words, Hirume simply accepted my stroking hand while his face blazed red.
1000636063.korean: - 말문이 막혔는지 히루메는 얼굴을 새빨갛게 물들인채 머리를 쓰다듬는 내 손길을 받아들이고만 있었다.

1000636064.english: Walking through the grass and chatting, the surroundings had grown noticeably dark before we noticed.
1000636064.korean: - 풀밭을 거닐며 이런저런 이야기를 나누다보니 어느새 주위가 부쩍 어두워졌다.

1000636066.english: Perhaps sulking from being teased, Hirume answered without looking at me.
1000636066.korean: - 놀려서 삐졌는지 히루메는 나를 쳐다보지도 않고 대답했다.

1000636067.english: Still, he hasn't dropped to calling me "you brat" or "you"—so I suppose that's okay?
1000636067.korean: - 그래도 호칭은 네녀석이나 네놈으로 떨어지지 않았으니까... 괜찮은 거겠지?

1000636068.english: It was past midnight when we returned to the Orca.

1000636069.english: After receiving a brief report, I returned to the captain's quarters, and there...
1000636069.korean: - 약식으로 보고를 받고, 함장실로 돌아오자 그곳엔...

1000636072.english: What the heck~ I shouldn't be getting charmed already.

1000636074.english: Aren't you going to tell me your thoughts?

1000636075.english: Oh my gosh. I told you you have no sense.

1000636076.english: Well, still... I like that aspect too, as it makes him seem like a commander.

1000636077.english: Hehe, correct. That's what I wanted to hear.
1000636077.korean: 히힛, 정답. 그 말을 듣고 싶었어.

1000636078.english: Miho said that and hugged my waist tightly.
1000636078.korean: - 미호는 그렇게 말하며 내 허리를 꼭 끌어안았다.

1000636079.english: Ahem. Well, I have prepared this for you. Please come into your chambers.
1000636079.korean: 흠흠. 자아, 소첩이 준비했사옵니다아~ 어서 침소에 드시옵소서~

1000636080.english: Led by Miho's touch, I pretended to be reluctant and headed to the bed.
1000636080.korean: - 미호의 손길에 이끌려 못이기는 척 침대로 향했다.

1000636081.english: No, I intended to head there.

1000636083.english: Turning around at the sound of something falling, I saw Hirume sitting on the floor, staring at me with eyes full of betrayal.
1000636083.korean: - 무언가 털썩 떨어지는 소리에 뒤돌아보니, 배신감에 가득 찬 눈으로 나를 바라보는 히루메가 바닥에 주저앉아 있었다.

1000636085.english: It would have been fine on any other day. How... on the very day I pledged a lifetime of happiness with my concubine... how could you turn your eyes to another woman...?
1000636085.korean: 다른 날이라면 괜찮았다. 어찌... 첩과 백년해로의 언약을 나눈 날... 다른 여성에게 눈을 돌릴 수가 있는 것이냐...?

1000636086.english: - Hirume's reaction made me recall what happened just moments ago.
1000636086.korean: - 히루메의 반응에 조금 전 일을 떠올려 보았다.

1000636087.english: No matter how much I think about it, we didn't exchange a vow of lifelong happiness...?
1000636087.korean: - 아무리 생각해봐도 백년해로의 언약을 나누지는 않았는데...?

1000636088.english: Commander, you played a prank again, didn't you?

1000636090.english: When I told her what had happened a little while ago, Miho laughed playfully and ruffled my hair.
1000636090.korean: - 조금 전 있었던 일을 말해주자, 미호는 장난스럽게 웃으며 내 머리를 헝클였다.

1000636091.english: Ugh. I told you, our commander always acts up in the weirdest places.
1000636091.korean: 으이그. 우리 사령관은 꼭 이상한데서 그런다니까.

1000636092.english: Right... the concubine was destined to be used like this anyway...
1000636092.korean: 그래... 첩은 어차피 이렇게 이용당할 운명이었다...

1000636093.english: Hahaha... It was a short dream, but I was happy...

1000636094.english: Well, still... since this was a problem of the highest difficulty, there is room for leniency.
1000636094.korean: 뭐 그래도... 이건 난이도 최상인 문제였으니까 정상참작의 여지는 있어.

1000636095.english: Hehe, a woman's heart is hard to understand.

1000636096.english: Now, let's go apologize. Good boy~

1000636097.english: What business do you have with the concubine?

1000636098.english: After hesitating for a moment, he held Hirume in his arms. He thought he would be rejected, but surprisingly, Hirume quietly snuggled into his embrace.
1000636098.korean: - 잠시 망설이다 히루메를 품에 안았다. 거절당할 거라고 생각했지만, 의외로 히루메는 얌전히 안겨왔다.

1000636099.english: ...It is the concubine's fault for expecting it even though she knew that you are naturally like that, not your fault.
1000636099.korean: ...그대가 원래 그렇다는 것을 알면서도 기대한 첩의 잘못이지, 그대의 잘못이 아니다.

1000636102.english: Ah, no, I misspoke. That's not it... um...
1000636102.korean: 아, 아니, 말이 헛나왔다. 그게 아니라... 그...

1000636103.english: I wanted to tell you that I... was looking forward to it very much.
1000636103.korean: 첩이 아주 많이... 기, 기대하고 있었노라고... 전하고 싶었다.

1000636104.english: Hehe, did you both make up?

1000636105.english: There was no need for reconciliation.

1000636108.english: - Actually, I like it a lot, though.

1000636110.english: If the tail were double, what do you think the commander would be like?
1000636110.korean: 꼬리가 두 배면, 사령관은 어떨 것 같아?

1000636112.english: Gasp... Gasp... No, this can't be...

1000636113.english: Th-to think I'd see visuals like this...!

1000636114.english: Hey, what are you doing! Hurry up and do some reconnaissance!
1000636114.korean: 야, 뭐하고 있어! 빨리 정찰이나 해!

1000636115.english: I'm telling you, now is not the time for that! Look, look at this!
1000636115.korean: 지금 그런걸 할 때가 아니라구요! 이, 이걸 보세요!

1000636119.english: This is definitely going to be my treasure, no, Earth's number one treasure!
1000636119.korean: 이건 틀림없이 제 보물, 아니 지구의 보물 1호가 될 거예요!

1000636121.english: Kyaaa, tails... tails...! The whole world is full of tails...!
1000636121.korean: 꺄아아, 꼬리가... 꼬리가아...! 온 세상에 꼬리가 가득해...!

1000636123.english: Sit down. Let's take a proper look together.

1000636124.english: Ah, I can't see. Come here— Ah, no, wait.
1000636124.korean: 아, 안보이잖아. 일로 좀- 아, 아니지.

1000636125.english: Hey, what are you guys going to do about the Iron Bugs!
1000636125.korean: 야, 너네들 철충은 어떻게 할 거야!

1000636126.english: The commander left. He told us to just hold our positions.
1000636126.korean: 대장이 갔어. 우린 위치나 지키고 있으래.

1000636129.english: Th-then... I guess it can't be helped...
1000636129.korean: 그, 그럼... 어쩔 수 없네, 뭐...

1000636130.english: Hehe, our Commander is completely out cold.
1000636130.korean: 헤헷, 우리 사령관, 완전히 곯아떨어져 버렸네.

1000636131.english: Well, he was... impressive... so I guess it's understandable.
1000636131.korean: 그리도, 그... 대단, 했으니... 그럴만도 하구나.

1000636133.english: That's not even a warm-up for the Commander.

1000636135.english: He's just sleeping because it's time to sleep. The Commander has so much work he hardly gets time to sleep.
1000636135.korean: 그냥 잘 때 되서 자는 거야. 사령관은 워낙 일이 많으니까 잘 시간이 별로 없거든.

1000636136.english: So when he does sleep, he sleeps this deeply. Look.
1000636136.korean: 그래서 잘때는 이렇게 깊게 자. 봐봐.

1000636138.english: Don't worry—this little poke won't wake him at all.
1000636138.korean: 이렇게 볼 찌르는 정도로는 절대 안 깨니까 걱정 마.

1000636139.english: ...He really sleeps without a care in the world.

1000636140.english: That much... means this place must be comfortable and safe for him.
1000636140.korean: 그만큼... 이곳이 편안하고 안심되는 공간이라는 뜻이겠지.

1000636141.english: You said you've been wandering around a lot, right?

1000636142.english: Yes. Since I was born, I've never once been able to rest my mind and sleep peacefully.
1000636142.korean: 그래, 태어나서 단 한번도... 마음 편히 눈을 붙혀본 적이 없다.

1000636143.english: If you're a soldier, you'd understand to some extent, wouldn't you?

1000636144.english: Well... maybe we're a bit different? We have somewhere to come back to.
1000636144.korean: 글쎄... 우리는 좀 다르지 않을까? 돌아올 곳이 있으니까.

1000636146.english: Even on long campaigns, no matter how hard it gets...

1000636147.english: If you think about the warm bath and the Commander waiting to welcome you for your hard work, you can bear it.
1000636147.korean: 따뜻한 목욕물이랑, 고생했다고 반겨주는 사령관이 기다리고 있다는 걸 생각하면 견딜 수 있거든.

1000636148.english: ...I went to the chapel not long ago.

1000636149.english: Those there, and you too... it seems the Commander means a lot to you all.
1000636149.korean: 그곳에 있던 자들도 그렇고, 너도 그렇고... 이자는 너희에게 정말로 큰 의미인가 보구나.

1000636153.english: He sometimes does silly things, but the Commander is basically a workaholic.
1000636153.korean: 가끔 엉뚱한 짓을 할 때도 있지만, 사령관은 기본적으로 일중독이야.

1000636154.english: Now that you mention it. Even with a little free time, I've seen him handle tasks in the gaps.
1000636154.korean: 음, 생각해보니 그렇구나. 조금만 시간이 비어도 틈틈히 업무를 처리하는 것을 보았다.

1000636156.english: Even while so busy, he tries to understand each of us and care for us. Look at this.
1000636156.korean: 그렇게 바쁜 와중에도, 우리들 하나하나를 이해하고, 신경써주려고 해. 이것 봐.

1000636157.english: [You Can Do It Too: Raising a Pet Fox!], [Fifty Legends of the Gumiho]...
1000636157.korean: [당신도 할 수 있다, 애완 여우 기르기!], [구미호 전설 50선]...

1000636158.english: Frankly speaking, the Commander doesn't need to pay attention to each of us.
1000636158.korean: 냉정히 말하면, 사령관은 우리 하나하나에게 관심을 둘 필요가 없어.

1000636159.english: He could just treat us as pawns, assign us to units, and command.
1000636159.korean: 그냥 장기말로 굴리면서, 소속 부대에 넣고 지휘만 하면 돼.

1000636160.english: Yet the Commander... treats us as persons, and even wants to get close to us individually.
1000636160.korean: 그런데도 사령관은... 우리를 인격체로 대해주는 걸 넘어서, 개인적으로도 친해지고 싶어해.

1000636162.english: Well... he says with his own mouth that he survived because of us, but honestly that's nonsense.
1000636162.korean: 글쎄... 자기 입으로는 뭐, 우리 덕분에 자기가 살아남을 수 있었다는데, 사실 말도 안 되는 소리야.

1000636163.english: On the contrary, if the Commander hadn't been there, we'd all have died long ago.
1000636163.korean: 반대로 사령관이 없었으면 우린 이미 옛날에 다 죽었을 테니까.

1000636165.english: Yes. I love him. I want to give him everything of mine.
1000636165.korean: 응. 사랑해. 내 모든 걸 다 주고 싶을 정도로.

1000636166.english: ...From how you act, it doesn't seem that extreme, though...

1000636167.english: Of course there's some give-and-take~ If I give away all my feelings and end up empty, that won't do.
1000636167.korean: 당연히 적당히 밀당하는거지~ 너무 내 마음을 다 주다가 텅 비어버리면 안되잖아?

1000636168.english: Well... today was an exception. Since I made up my mind to come, I honestly poured out my heart with all my strength.
1000636168.korean: 뭐... 오늘은 예외였지만. 모처럼 마음 먹고 온 거니까, 있는 힘껏 솔직하게 내 마음을 전한 거야.

1000636170.english: Ahaha, don't be so embarrassed. You're making me embarrassed too.
1000636170.korean: 아하하, 그렇게 부끄러워 하지 마. 나까지 부끄러워진다.

1000636171.english: Do you have a rough idea now what kind of person the Commander is?
1000636171.korean: 이제 사령관이 어떤 사람인지 대충 알겠어?

1000636173.english: What do you think he's like?

1000636174.english: Reliable, but with a mischievous streak...

1000636177.english: Right, right? Our Commander is surprisingly dark inside, you know?
1000636177.korean: 그치그치? 우리 사령관, 의외로 속이 시커멓다니까?

1000636178.english: Ugh... now that I think back, all his actions seem kind of lewd...
1000636178.korean: 으으... 아니, 돌이켜보니 모든 행동이 다 음란한 것 같기도...

1000636179.english: And yet... when I'm by his side I feel extremely reassured.
1000636179.korean: 그런데도... 곁에 있으면 몹시, 안심이 되는구나.

1000636181.english: When you're beside the Commander, you get the feeling that whatever happens will be okay.
1000636181.korean: 사령관 곁에 있으면, 무슨 일이 일어나도 괜찮을 것 같은 기분이 들어.

1000636182.english: Hehe, that's a good relationship of trust.

1000636184.english: Oof—now I should go take a bath. Ah, do you want to join?
1000636184.korean: 읏차~ 이제 나는 목욕이나 해야겠다. 아, 너도 같이 할래?

1000636186.english: Don't be like that~ I'll tell you about the things that happened with the Commander.
1000636186.korean: 그러지 말구~ 사령관이랑 있었던 일들, 말해줄게.

1000636189.english: Come on, let's wash each other's hair~

1000636191.english: I woke up to the familiar sound of the alarm. I reached out to turn it off, pulled away the blanket, and started to sit up…
1000636191.korean: - 익숙한 알람 소리와 함께 정신이 들었다. 손을 뻗어 알람을 끄고 이불을 걷고 몸을 일으키려는데...

1000636193.english: What was covering me wasn't a blanket, but Hirume's fluffy tail. Hugging my waist as she slept, Hirume showed no signs of waking.
1000636193.korean: - 내가 덮고 있던 건 이불이 아니라 히루메의 폭신한 꼬리였다. 내 허리를 껴안은 채 잠들어 있는 히루메는 푹 잠들어 일어날 기색이 보이지 않는다.

1000636194.english: While I was debating whether to wake her, my eyes caught a small note placed by the bedside.
1000636194.korean: - 히루메를 깨워야하나 고민하던 중, 머리맡에 놓은 작은 쪽지가 눈에 들어왔다.

1000636195.english: [Commander, did you sleep well? I'm heading out first. If I want the other girls to win prizes too, I'll have to work reaaally hard.]
1000636195.korean: [사령관, 잘 잤어? 나는 먼저 갈게. 다른 애들도 상품 따게 하려면 나도 엄~청 굴러야 되니까.]

1000636196.english: [It's better to just let Hirume sleep. We bathed together yesterday, and talked late into the night. She may have had some changes of heart… that's something you should hear directly.]
1000636196.korean: [히루메는 그냥 자게 두는 게 좋겠어. 어제 같이 목욕하고, 또 늦게까지 이야기 했거든. 아마 심경의 변화도 있었을 텐데... 이건 직접 듣는게 좋겠다.]

1000636197.english: [Why don't you sleep in too, Commander~ I'll explain things to Konstancja. See you next time.&n&nMiho, secretly playing a prank on the soundly sleeping Commander.]
1000636197.korean: [이참에 사령관도 늦잠 좀 자구~ 콘스탄챠한테는 내가 말해둘게. 다음에 봐.&n- 세상 모르고 잠든 사령관한테 몰래 장난을 치며, 미호가.]

1000636199.english: Instead of waking, Hirume nuzzled his nose into my chest and hugged me tighter, so I lay back down.
1000636199.korean: - 깨기는 커녕 내 가슴팍에 코를 문지르며 더욱 꼭 끌어안는 히루메를 보며 다시 침대에 누웠다.

1000636201.english: A sensation I hadn't noticed before. When I stroked his twitching ears as he slept, Hirume made a strange little sound and shifted his body.
1000636201.korean: - 예전에 미처 느끼지 못했던 감촉. 자면서도 쫑긋거리는 귀를 쓰다듬자 히루메는 묘한 소리를 내며 몸을 뒤척였다.

1000636202.english: Then a familiar scent tickled the tip of my nose.
1000636202.korean: - 그러자 익숙한 향기가 코 끝을 간질인다.

1000636203.english: The time was still that ambiguous hour between dawn and morning.
1000636203.korean: - 시간은 아직 새벽이라고도, 아침이라고도 할 수 있는 시각.

1000636204.english: Listening to the distant bustle of crew members starting preparations for the event, I drifted slowly back to sleep.
1000636204.korean: - 멀리서 들려오는, 이른 시간부터 행사를 준비하는 대원들의 시끌벅적한 소리를 들으며 다시 천천히 잠에 빠져들었다.

1000636208.english: Sorry, could you look after the Dryad for a bit?

1000636211.english: So Lise has this side to her too.

1000636212.english: ...She won't keep acting like that, will she?

1000636214.english: They said securing the area is almost done, so I'm thinking of going to a place called Ilchulbong beforehand.
1000636214.korean: 지역 확보 거의 끝났대서, 일출봉이란 곳에 미리 한 번 가보려고.

1000636215.english: Yeah. Keep the house safe while I'm gone.

1000636216.english: By the way, were you really stuck in the storage that whole time?
1000636216.korean: 그런데, 진짜로 그동안 계속 창고에 있었던 거야?

1000636217.english: Wandering around... didn't you run into anyone?

1000636220.english: If that's the case, I can understand it a bit.

1000636223.english: ...I-I'll ask you later if I get the chance.

1000636224.english: You want to be recognized, huh?

1000636231.english: It must've been hard Setting your hair.

1000636233.english: How did you get that to match...

1000636234.english: Sorry. I didn't mean to disappoint you.

1000636243.english: ...Looks like you finally made a friend.

1000636244.english: You two suit each other really well.

1000636248.english: Is that all for today's work?

1000636249.english: Due to the frenzied preparations for the event that had continued for several days, not only the captain's quarters but the entire Orca was in a state of chaos.
1000636249.korean: - 몇일간 이어진 광란의 행사준비로 함장실은 물론 오르카 호 전체가 혼란의 도가니가 되어 있었다.

1000636250.english: From familiar ornaments that we have seen all along, to ornaments that are not only never seen before but also have no clue what they are used for.
1000636250.korean: - 익히 보던 익숙한 장식품부터, 생전 처음보는 것도 모자라서 무엇에 쓰는지 짐작도 되지 않는 장식품들.

1000636251.english: On top of that, there were even members who had each acquired a costume they liked from who knows where.
1000636251.korean: - 거기다 어디서 구해왔는지 각자 마음에 드는 코스튬을 한 벌씩 장만해 입은 대원들까지.

1000636252.english: Today is truly the day of reckoning. With 23:59:59 today as the final moment, the day that has kept me on edge for the past few months comes to an end.
1000636252.korean: - 오늘이야말로 결전의 날. 오늘 23시 59분 59초를 마지막으로, 지난 몇 달간 나를 전전긍긍하게 했던 하루가 지나간다.

1000636253.english: Their joy makes even the concubine happy.

1000636254.english: Thanks to everyone's hard work, the New Year's event is being held grandly.
1000636254.korean: - 다들 열심히 해준 덕분에 신년 행사는 성대하게 열리는 중.

1000636255.english: To ensure that the entire force can enjoy themselves at least for today, the commanders are on guard duty, just like last winter which now feels like a distant memory.
1000636255.korean: - 오늘 하루만큼은 전 병력이 마음 편히 즐길 수 있도록, 이제는 멀게 느껴지는 저번 겨울처럼 대장들이 경계 임무를 맡고 있다.

1000636257.english: Hirume suddenly spoke up as she watched the crew members packed tightly around the captain's quarters, eating, drinking, and having fun.
1000636257.korean: - 함장실에도 빼곡히 둘러앉아 먹고 마시고 즐기는 대원들을 보며 히루메가 문득 입을 열었다.

1000636258.english: Isn't everyone in love with you?

1000636259.english: Before the laughter of some crew members who heard those words could even dissipate, Hirume's next remark brought silence to the noisy captain's quarters.
1000636259.korean: - 그 말을 들은 몇몇 대원이 흘린 웃음 소리가 채 흩어지기도 전에, 히루메의 다음 한 마디가 시끄럽던 함장실에 침묵을 불러왔다.

1000636260.english: But... aren't you giving me chocolate?

1000636261.english: A chilling silence fills the captain's quarters.

1000636262.english: Like a dagger, the bewildered gazes of the squad members fly in and pierce.
1000636262.korean: - 마치 비수처럼, 대원들의 황망한 시선이 날아와 꽂힌다.

1000636264.english: After two seconds had passed, Hirume was the only one in the captain's cabin who had not grasped the situation.
1000636264.korean: - 2초가 지난 후, 함장실에서 상황을 파악하지 못한 것은 히루메 혼자 뿐이었다.

1000636265.english: I'm so, so, so sorry, Master!

1000636266.english: The head chef said he is mobilizing everyone to make the chocolate base, so please wait just a little longer!
1000636266.korean: 지금 주방장님이 모든 인원을 동원해서 초콜릿 베이스를 만든다고 하시니까, 조금만 기다려주세요!

1000636267.english: That was a close call! I can't miss Valentine's Day, which only comes once a year!
1000636267.korean: 큰일날 뻔 했잖아! 일 년에 한 번 밖에 없는 발렌타인 데이를 놓칠 순 없지!

1000636268.english: I'll take the kids out and sweep up all the ingredients!
1000636268.korean: 나는 애들 데리고 나가서 재료를 싹 쓸어올게!

1000636269.english: My desperate cry was drowned out and disappeared by the voices of the squad members, who were chattering excitedly and scattering to take on their respective roles.
1000636269.korean: - 내 처절한 외침은 신나게 떠들며 각자 역할을 분담해 흩어지는 대원들의 목소리에 묻혀 사라지고 말았다.

1000636271.english: Haha, I tell you in advance, I did not do this on purpose. I swear to the one I serve.
1000636271.korean: 후후, 미리 말하지만 일부러 그런 것이 아니다. 첩이 모시는 분께 맹세하겠다.

1000636272.english: I approached him with the most threatening expression possible, but Hirume showed no signs of being scared at all.
1000636272.korean: - 가능한 최고로 위협적인 표정을 지으며 다가갔지만, 히루메는 전혀 겁을 먹는 기색이 없다.

1000636273.english: I merely let out a laugh at the fact that my concubine was right. Do not be angry.
1000636273.korean: 그저 첩의 생각이 맞았다는 사실에 웃음이 새어나왔을 뿐이다. 노여워 말거라.

1000636274.english: Thanks to Hirume, who chuckled and patted my head, I lost all energy to be angry.
1000636274.korean: - 쿡쿡 웃으며 내 머리를 토닥이는 히루메 덕분에 분노할 여력도 사라져버렸다.

1000636276.english: Didn't your men face the Iron Bug?
1000636276.korean: 그대의 대원들이 철충과 마주한 것 아니더냐?

1000636277.english: I went back to the desk and looked at the panel.
1000636277.korean: - 다시 책상으로 돌아가 패널을 들여다 보았다.

1000636278.english: There, the image of the squad members breaking through the Iron Bugs blocking the path with a valor never seen before came to mind.
1000636278.korean: - 그곳엔, 길을 막는 철충들을 지금껏 본 적 없는 용맹함으로 돌파하는 대원들의 모습이 떠올라 있었다.

1000636279.english: < A Wish Someone Wished For > END...?

1000636280.english: …In truth, this is how it really was.

1000636281.english: Around this time last year, I faced an unexpected trial.
1000636281.korean: - 작년 이맘때, 나는 생각지도 못한 시련을 맞이했다.

1000636282.english: Yes. A harsh, dark-brown trial far beyond anything that could be compared to fighting the Bugs.
1000636282.korean: - 그래. 철충과 싸우는 것과는 비교도 하지 못할 정도로 가혹한, 흑갈색 시련을.

1000636283.english: Your Majesty~ Would you taste the chocolate I prepared for you~?
1000636283.korean: 폐하앙~ 제가 준비한 초콜릿을 맛 봐 주시겠어요~?

1000636284.english: The chocolate made by that busty one is probably an empty flavor with nothing inside.
1000636284.korean: 이 왕가슴이 만든 초콜릿은 아무것도 든 게 없는 텅 빈 맛이겠죠.

1000636285.english: But mine… surely has a very rich, sticky taste to it?
1000636285.korean: 그에 반해 제 초콜릿은... 분명 아주 농염하고, 끈적한 맛일 거랍니다?

1000636286.english: At first, I was truly happy. After all, what man wouldn't be glad to receive chocolates filled with more affection than he deserved from the people he loved?
1000636286.korean: - 처음에는 정말로 기뻤다. 사랑하는 사람들에게 과분할 정도의 애정이 담긴 초콜릿을 받고 기뻐하지 않을 남자가 있을까?

1000636287.english: Commander, if you have a moment… I made some ch-chocolate. Would you taste it?
1000636287.korean: 사령관, 잠시 시간을 내서... 춰컬릿을 만들어봤어요. 맛, 봐 줄래요?

1000636288.english: But… as the old saying goes, too much is as bad as too little—everything has its limit.
1000636288.korean: - 하지만... 옛말에 과유불급이라는 말이 있듯, 모든 일에는 한도가 있다.

1000636289.english: Dear customer~ This chocolate has liquor inside, so you mustn't eat too much of it~
1000636289.korean: 손님~ 이 초콜릿엔 술이 들어가있으니까, 너무 많이 먹으면 안 된답니다~

1000636290.english: Well… not that I'd really mind, but…

1000636292.english: Y-you've already gotten a lot, right… Ahaha, do your best eating them. I'll be cheering for you!
1000636292.korean: 이, 이미 많이 받았지 참... 아하하, 먹는 거 힘내. 응원할게!

1000636294.english: Here, please take this chocolate. Heheh, making it was harder than I thought…
1000636294.korean: 여기, 초콜릿 받으세요. 헤헷, 만드는 게 생각보다 어렵네요...

1000636295.english: Practically every subordinate under my command gave me chocolate, and soon the captain's quarters had no room to even set foot in.
1000636295.korean: - 사실상 내 휘하의 모든 대원들이 내게 초콜릿을 줬고, 함장실은 초콜릿으로 발 디딜 틈도 없어져 버렸다.

1000636296.english: And of course, I couldn't just not taste the chocolates they had worked so hard to make.
1000636296.korean: - 거기다 열심히 만든 초콜릿을 맛도 보지 않을 수는 없는 노릇.

1000636297.english: But even eating chocolate twelve times a day, my pace couldn't keep up with the rate at which I was receiving them, and the flood of chocolates continued for weeks.
1000636297.korean: - 하지만 하루 열두끼를 초콜릿만 먹어도, 먹는 속도가 받는 속도의 발끝도 따라가지 못한 채 초콜릿 행렬은 몇주동안 이어졌다.

1000636299.english: There's some for you too, Captain… so please…

1000636300.english: It was only when I began to wonder if chocolate was flowing through my veins instead of blood that the chocolate hell finally ended.
1000636300.korean: - 내 몸에 피 대신 초콜릿이 흐르는게 아닐까 하는 생각이 들 때가 되서야 초코 지옥은 간신히 끝났다.

1000636301.english: …That was the story of last spring.

1000636303.english: And then time passed, and last winter, as the fated day drew ever closer, my lips grew parched.
1000636303.korean: - 그리고 시간이 흘러 작년 겨울, 점점 다가오는 운명의 날에 내 입술은 바짝 타들어갔다.

1000636304.english: "Let's move on to the next agenda. We need to finalize the schedule up to February. As usual, we'll prepare a rough draft, then submit it for your approval, Master—"
1000636304.korean: 다음 의제로 넘어갈게요. 2월까지의 일정을 결정해야하는데, 평소대로 저희가 대략적인 개요를 작성 후 주인님께 결재를-

1000636305.english: This year, the number of subordinates under my command had grown beyond all comparison. No—grown, and then some.
1000636305.korean: - 올해에는 휘하 대원의 수가 비교도 할 수 없을 정도로 늘어났다. 아니, 늘어나고 말았다.

1000636306.english: From the soldiers rescued through regular operations, to the fleet brought by the dragon, to the members of the "Fairy Village" I met in the summer with Cerestia, and so on…
1000636306.korean: - 통상 구출 작전으로 구해낸 대원들부터, 용이 이끌고 온 함대, 여름에 만난 세레스티아의 '요정 마을' 일원들 등등...

1000636307.english: As the commander of the resistance, this was a joyous thing. But for me, personally, there was no greater tragedy.
1000636307.korean: - 저항군 사령관으로서의 나에겐 기쁜 일이지만, 나 개인에겐 이런 비극도 없다.

1000636309.english: "Master, you should concern yourself with matters more important than this—"
1000636309.korean: 주인님, 주인님께선 그보다 더 중요한 일에 신경을-

1000636312.english: On top of that, I could feel, tangibly, that the feelings my subordinates held toward me had deepened even further.
1000636312.korean: - 거기에 나를 향한 대원들의 감정도 더욱 깊어졌다는 것을 피부로 느낀다.

1000636313.english: Of course, it was something to be grateful for, and it made me happy… but as a result, the amount of that chocolate-brown calamity would only multiply.
1000636313.korean: - 물론 고맙고 기쁜 일이지만... 그 결과, 흑갈색 재앙의 양은 제곱이 되어버리겠지.

1000636315.english: Oh my, is this a New Year's event?

1000636316.english: Looking at this date… it's the lunar calendar.

1000636317.english: That's right. The countries near where Master was discovered often celebrated the New Year by the lunar calendar.
1000636317.korean: 그렇네요. 주인님께서 발견되신 곳 근처의 나라들은 음력으로 새해를 기념하곤 했으니까요.

1000636318.english: I wasn't lying. Celebrating the New Year by the lunar calendar really was a cultural practice.
1000636318.korean: - 거짓말은 하지 않았다. 음력으로 새해를 새는 것은 실제로 있었던 문화니까.

1000636319.english: Of course, what truly mattered to me wasn't that—it was the fact that it overlapped with Valentine's Day.
1000636319.korean: - 물론 내게 중요한 건 그게 아니라 발렌타인 데이와 날짜가 겹친다는 사실이었지만.

1000636322.english: Once again, I am buried under a mountain of chocolate.

1000636323.english: Oh my, you're quite popular this year as well.

1000636324.english: It was fifty-fifty… what a pity, Your Majesty.

1000636325.english: Saying so, Armand set a large bundle down on the desk.
1000636325.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 아르망은 책상에 커다란 꾸러미를 내려놓았다.

1000636326.english: It's chocolate prepared by those who caught on early. This much shouldn't be too much of a burden for Your Majesty, right?
1000636326.korean: 미리 눈치 챈 인원들끼리 준비한 초콜릿입니다. 이정도면 폐하께 그리 부담되는 양은 아니겠죠?

1000636328.english: Watching Armand smile with her tongue slightly sticking out, I untied the bundle with trembling hands.
1000636328.korean: - 혀를 살짝 내밀며 웃는 아르망을 보며 덜덜 떨리는 손으로 꾸러미를 풀었다.

1000636329.english: Why such a grim face? You've received so much love.
1000636329.korean: 왜 그렇게 죽을 상인게냐. 이렇게나 큰 사랑을 받았거늘.

1000636330.english: Everyone prepared this for you. Why would you give it away to someone else? Eat it with joy.
1000636330.korean: 다들 그대를 위해 준비한 것이다. 어찌 남에게 주려 하느냐. 기쁘게 먹거라.

1000636331.english: And I am a fox, am I not? You studied so much and yet didn't even know that foxes are canines?
1000636331.korean: 그리고 첩은 여우이지 않느냐. 그렇게나 공부했으면서 여우가 갯과인 것도 몰랐던게냐.

1000636332.english: Hirume, who seemed to be in quite a good mood, continued to chatter on.
1000636332.korean: - 어쩐지 몹시 기분이 좋아보이는 히루메는 계속해서 말을 늘어놓았다.

1000636333.english: Heh, last time you made such a mess of me and strutted around so proudly, and now look at you. Serves you right.
1000636333.korean: 쿡쿡, 저번에는 첩을 엉망진창으로 만들면서 그렇게나 으스대더니, 꼴 좋게 되었다.

1000636334.english: Yes, you did strut. Shamelessly teasing me when I couldn't resist…
1000636334.korean: 분명 으스대었다. 저항하지 못하는 첩을 마구... 희, 희롱하면서 말이다.

1000636335.english: Go on, try it again. Do you think I'll be afraid?
1000636335.korean: 어, 어디 한 번 해보거라. 첩이 겁 먹을 줄 아느냐.

1000636336.english: After circling around me with light steps for a while, Hirume finally plopped down onto the sofa.
1000636336.korean: - 한동안 가벼운 발걸음으로 내 주위를 빙빙 돌던 히루메는 소파에 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000636338.english: So, has your wish been granted?

1000636339.english: Are you still speaking falsehoods? Your popularity isn't that deep after all.
1000636339.korean: 아직도 거짓을 고하는 것이냐. 첩도 인망이 두텁지 못하구나.

1000636340.english: Surely your true desire isn't some childish wish like "I don't want to eat chocolate this year," is it?
1000636340.korean: 설마 올해는 초콜릿을 먹기 싫다는, 이런 어린애 같은 소원이 그대의 진짜 바람인것이냐?

1000636341.english: Speak honestly. If you believe in the superstition that voicing a wish will prevent it from coming true, then so be it.
1000636341.korean: 솔직히 말해 보거라. 혹여 소원을 입 밖에 내면 이루어지지 않는다는 미신을 믿는 거라면 어쩔 수 없지만.

1000636342.english: Then is there anything holding you back? Say it already. Ah, yes.
1000636342.korean: 그렇다면 망설일 것이 있느냐. 어서 말해 보거라. 아, 그래.

1000636343.english: Perhaps I, with my sacred power, might grant your wish.
1000636343.korean: 첩이 신령스러운 힘으로 그대의 소원을 이루어줄지도 모르지 않느냐.

1000636344.english: —Hirume listened quietly to my words, which somehow sounded like an excuse, and smiled.
1000636344.korean: - 어쩐지 변명하는 것처럼 들리는 내 말을 히루메는 가만히 웃으며 듣고 있다.

1000636345.english: At that smile, as if there really were a sacred power, I found myself speaking without thinking.
1000636345.korean: - 그 미소에 진짜 신령스러운 힘이라도 있는지, 나도 모르게 입을 열었다.

1000636346.english: Hirume, upon hearing me, smiled in a way that was at once incredulous and delighted.
1000636346.korean: - 내 말을 들은 히루메는 어이없게도, 기쁘게도 보이는 미소를 지었다.

1000636350.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 히루메는 내 손을 잡았다.

1000636351.english: Would you hear my wish too?

1000636352.english: I... even if only for a little while, wish to be able to live at ease.
1000636352.korean: 첩은... 잠시라도 좋으니, 마음을 놓고 지낼 수 있는 것을 원했다.

1000636353.english: Whether it's a person, a place, or anything else — it doesn't matter.
1000636353.korean: 그게 사람이든, 장소이든, 다른 어떤 무엇이든 상관 없었다.

1000636354.korean: 어떻느냐. 첩의 소원도 별 거 아니다.

1000636355.english: Y-you accept that so readily? At least I didn't wish for two things like you did.
1000636355.korean: 그, 그렇게 단박에 수긍하는 것이냐. 적어도 첩은 그대처럼 소원을 두 가지나 빌지는 않았다.

1000636356.english: —I am greedy. At least not so shamelessly greedy as to wish for two New Year's wishes like Hirume.
1000636356.korean: - 나는 욕심이 많다. 적어도 히루메의 말처럼 뻔뻔하게 새해 소원을 두 가지나 빌 정도로는 그렇다.

1000636357.english: —But I think it was precisely that greed that brought us this far.
1000636357.korean: - 하지만... 바로 그 욕심 때문에 우리는 여기까지 올 수 있었던 거라고 생각한다.

1000636358.english: The greed to lose not a single person, the greed to build relationships with every member.
1000636358.korean: - 누구 하나도 잃지 않겠다는 욕심, 모든 대원들과 관계를 쌓아 나가겠다는 욕심.

1000636359.english: Heh heh, yes. "Greedy" suits you perfectly.
1000636359.korean: 후후, 그래. 그대에게는 욕심쟁이라는 말이 딱 어울리는구나.

1000636360.english: Surely you'll have more wishes to make after this one is granted, won't you?
1000636360.korean: 필시 그 소원이 이루어진 다음에 빌 소원도 있겠지. 그렇지 않느냐?

1000636362.english: —Hirume's hand, which had been layered over mine, slowly slid and interlaced fingers with mine. Warmth from the touching palms flowed through.
1000636362.korean: - 포개져있던 히루메의 손이 천천히 미끄러져 깍지를 끼웠다. 맞닿은 손바닥으로 따뜻한 체온이 전해져온다.

1000636363.english: I will, with all my might, make your wish come true.

1000636367.english: Still, we mustn't let our guard down until the end...

1000636374.english: Hirume, can you look at me for a moment...?

1000636382.english: Everyone's so busy. This time I'll do it from the start.
1000636382.korean: 그... 다, 다들 바쁘잖아. 이번엔 처음부터 내가 할게.

1000636385.english: Did you expect it to turn out like this...?

1000636386.english: Until a few hours ago, yes...

1000636390.english: No, Hachiko and Fenrir ate chocolate just fine...
1000636390.korean: 아니, 하치코랑 펜리르는 초콜릿 잘만 먹던데...

1000636392.english: You really say that after seeing this chocolate mountain...?
1000636392.korean: 이 초코 마운틴을 보고도 그런 말이 나오니...?

1000636395.english: It's nothing special. Even if I tell you, it won't mean much.
1000636395.korean: 별 거 아냐. 들어봐야 의미도 없고.

1000636401.english: Right. You can't even count them.

1000636402.english: ...You want to be on the receiving end again, huh!

1000636404.english: —Click, click— the pleasant sound of high heels ringing down the corridor.
1000636404.korean: - 또각, 또각, 하고 복도에 울리는 기분 좋은 구두 굽 소리.

1000636405.english: —It's a sound you hear fairly often while working in the captain's office, but the walk has a distinctive atmosphere you can sense.
1000636405.korean: - 함장실에서 업무를 보고 있자면 심심치않게 들리는 소리지만, 걸음걸이에서 느껴지는 독특한 분위기로 알 수 있다.

1000636406.english: Since joining the Orca, she's conquered the ship's administrative work with seemingly supernatural skill.
1000636406.korean: 오르카 호에 합류한 뒤, 신들린 듯한 능력으로 선내 사무 업무를 평정한 그녀다.

1000636407.english: Master, sorry to disturb you during work, but I have something to deliver personally—
1000636407.korean: 주인님, 업무 중에 죄송합니다만 직접 전달드릴 말씀이...

1000636408.english: —The Alpha who entered bowed deeply to me.
1000636408.korean: - 들어온 알파는 내게 깊게 허리를 숙였다.

1000636409.english: Forgive me. Old habits are not easy to fix all at once.
1000636409.korean: 용서하세요. 지난 날의 습관을 바로 고치기는 쉽지 않네요.

1000636410.english: Do you remember the document I showed you last time? About the tower we lifted from Alaska, from Omega.
1000636410.korean: 저번에 보여드렸던 자료, 기억하시나요? 알래스카, 오메가에게서 빼돌렸던 탑에 대한 거요.

1000636411.english: To be precise, my informant found out.

1000636413.english: You must be the Commander, right? Kyaa, amazing!
1000636413.korean: 그쪽 분이 사령관님 맞으시죠? 꺄아, 대박!

1000636414.english: I'm sorry, she's a child who doesn't know proper manners...

1000636415.english: This is the informant I mentioned last time, Orangeade.
1000636415.korean: 이쪽은 저번에 말씀드린 제 정보원, 오렌지에이드에요.

1000636416.english: Orangeade, give the Master a proper greeting.

1000636418.english: —As Orangeade winked and made a V sign with her fingers, Alpha's brow furrowed deeply.
1000636418.korean: - 윙크를 날리곤 손가락으로 브이자를 만드는 오렌지에이드를 보며 알파는 미간의 주름이 깊어졌다.

1000636419.english: I reaaally wanted to meet you... but Ms. Alpha wouldn't even connect me...
1000636419.korean: 엄~청 뵙고 싶었는데... 알파 님은 연결도 안해주시고...

1000636420.english: Originally, Orangeade's mission was the search and recovery of Bioroids left in the world, but there's a limit to what she can find without going out herself, so I asked her for support.
1000636420.korean: 원래 오렌지에이드양의 임무는 세계에 남겨진 바이오로이드의 수색과 인도였습니다만, 아무래도 직접 나가지 않으면 얻을 수 있는 정보의 한계가 있어서 그녀에게 조력을 요청했어요.

1000636424.english: —Rubbing her temples, Alpha properly introduced Orangeade.
1000636424.korean: - 관자놀이를 문지르던 알파가 정식으로 오렌지에이드를 소개해주었다.

1000636425.english: —She seemed to be something of a headhunter, traveling all over the world for her work. On top of that, she even carried out Alpha's personal missions.
1000636425.korean: - 그녀는 일종의 헤드헌터로서, 전세계를 돌아다니며 활동하는 모양이다. 덤으로 알파의 개인적인 임무까지 수행하면서.

1000636426.english: I should have reported earlier, but I lost contact with Orangeade and couldn't get any updates. I'm glad we're connected again.
1000636426.korean: 먼저 보고를 드렸어야 했는데, 그동안 오렌지에이드 양과 연락이 끊겨 저도 소식을 알 수 없는 상황이었습니다. 다시 연결이 되어서 다행이에요.

1000636427.english: Ugh... I seriously thought I was gonna die. You really can't underestimate Siberia's environment... I mean really, really—
1000636427.korean: 어휴... 진짜 죽는 줄 알았다구요. 시베리아의 환경을 만만히 보는 게 아니었음요... 진짜진짜루-

1000636428.english: Master, please look at this. It's a photo Orangeade sent.
1000636428.korean: 주인님, 이걸 봐주세요. 오렌지에이드 양이 전송한 사진입니다.

1000636430.english: —The image that appeared was the same one I had seen before in Alpha's hideout.
1000636430.korean: - 화면에 나타난 이미지는 이전, 알파의 은거지에서 본 것이었다.

1000636431.english: That's right. Commonly called the "Tower of Iron."

1000636432.english: —Its exterior was pitch black like obsidian, covered entirely by ominous red patterns crawling upward. The structure looked as if it could be the carapace of an Iron Worm, soaring high into the sky.
1000636432.korean: - 마치 흑옥처럼 검은 외벽을 타고 올라가듯이, 불길한 붉은 무늬가 탑 전체를 뒤덮고 있다. 철충의 외피라고 해도 어색하지 않을 형태의 구조물이 하늘 높이 솟아 있었다.

1000636433.english: —This was... the "Tower of Iron" we had long been trying to track down...
1000636433.korean: - 이것이... 그동안 우리가 찾아내려 노력하고 있던 '철의 탑'...

1000636434.english: But... this is not the same as what Omega detected. Look at the surroundings.
1000636434.korean: 그런데... 이것은 오메가가 탐지한 것과는 다른 것입니다. 주변 환경을 봐주세요.

1000636435.english: —As Alpha said, the tower's appearance was nearly identical, but the terrain clearly marked it as a different location. And the decisive difference was...
1000636435.korean: - 알파의 말대로 탑의 모습은 거의 비슷하지만, 지형을 보아하니 분명히 다른 장소였다. 그리고 결정적인 차이점은…

1000636436.english: As you can see, no trace of Iron Worms was found around this tower.
1000636436.korean: 보시다시피, 탑 주변에서 철충의 흔적을 찾을 수 없었다고 해요.

1000636437.english: —That was exactly why we had always been wary of the Tower of Iron. From afar, it looked like blackened ground, swarming with masses of Iron Worms.
1000636437.korean: - 우리가 철의 탑을 경계한 이유 중 하나가 바로 그것이었다. 멀리서 보면 검은 땅처럼 보일 정도로 새까맣게 들어찬 철충의 무리.

1000636438.english: —Like moths drawn to flame, the Iron Worm legions spread across the land, centered around the tower. But in this photo, none could be seen.
1000636438.korean: - 불빛에 모여드는 벌레 떼처럼, 탑을 중심으로 대지를 뒤덮은 철충 군단이 이 사진에서는 보이지 않았다.

1000636439.english: Isn't it fascinating? It's clearly the same kind of facility, yet for some reason, this one seems abandoned.
1000636439.korean: 흥미롭지 않으신가요? 분명 같은 시설일텐데, 어떤 이유에서인지 이곳은 방치되어 있는 것 같아요.

1000636441.english: —This definitely required deeper investigation. However... the risks that came with it were beyond imagination.
1000636441.korean: - 확실히 이건 더 깊게 조사할 필요성이 있다. 그렇지만... 그에 따른 위험부담은 상상조차 되지 않는다.

1000636442.english: ...I will follow whatever orders you give, Master. I'm sure the others will do the same.

1000636443.english: —Once I made up my mind, Alpha gestured to Orangeade.
1000636443.korean: - 내가 마음을 굳히자, 알파가 오렌지에이드에게 눈짓했다.

1000636444.english: Yes~! This is Sebas on the Crimean Peninsula…

1000636445.english: Sebas… Sebas… ah, what was it again…

1000636446.english: Ahem, sorry. This is the city of Se. Ba. St. Opol on the Crimean Peninsula. The "Tower of Iron" is located near a naval base on the Black Sea.
1000636446.korean: 흠흠, 죄송. 여기는 크림 반도의 도시 세.바.스.토.폴이에요. '철의 탑'은 흑해에 접한 해군 기지 근처에 위치하고 있죠.

1000636447.english: —Except for the towering structure, the landscape in the photo was just a wide, empty plain.
1000636447.korean: - 우뚝 솟은 탑을 제외하고는, 사진 속 풍경은 탁 트인 허허벌판 뿐이었다.

1000636448.english: It's hard to believe, but according to records, this was once the site of a highly concentrated metropolis.
1000636448.korean: 이해하기 어렵지만... 기록에 따르면 여기엔 분명 고도로 집중된 대도시가 위치해 있었어요.

1000636449.english: —As Alpha gestured, another photo appeared. A past image of the same location, showing densely packed buildings, military bases, and roads stretching in all directions.
1000636449.korean: - 알파가 손짓하자 또다른 사진이 떠올랐다. 같은 곳을 찍은 과거의 사진, 빽빽한 건물들과 군사기지, 사방으로 뻗어나간 도로들이 보인다.

1000636455.english: I've verified the relevant information, Commander.

1000636456.english: It seems… we've finally caught their trail.
1000636456.korean: 마침내... 놈들의 꼬리를 잡은 것 같소.

1000636457.english: —After convening the meeting, I reviewed the information sent by Orangeade.
1000636457.korean: - 회의를 소집한 후 나도 오렌지에이드가 보내준 정보를 훑어보았다.

1000636458.english: —Despite her casual demeanor, the documents were neatly organized, clearly showing why Alpha uses Orangeade as an informant.
1000636458.korean: - 가벼운 언동과는 달리 보기좋게 정리된 문서에서 알파가 오렌지에이드를 정보원으로 쓰는 이유를 알 수 있었다.

1000636460.english: That tower is deep inland. Not only the Orca, but even the fleet under my command would have difficulty providing support.
1000636460.korean: 저 탑은 내륙 깊숙한 곳에 있소. 오르카 호는 물론, 소관이 이끄는 함대도 지원이 어렵소.

1000636461.english: That, too, carries significant risk. A large force would have to move by land and would almost certainly be detected by the Metal Parasites' surveillance.
1000636461.korean: 그것 또한 위험 부담이 큽니다. 대규모 병력이라면 육로로 이동할 수박에 없고, 분명 철충들의 감시망에 감지될 것입니다.

1000636462.english: —If too many troops are deployed, detection by the Metal Parasites could lead at minimum to localized skirmishes and at worst to a full-scale battle, while sending a small special ops team could result in heavy casualties.
1000636462.korean: - 너무 많은 병력을 동원할 경우 철충에게 들켜 최소 국지전에서 최악의 경우 전면전이 발생할 수 있고, 소규모 특공대를 투입할 경우 희생이 커질 염려가 있다.

1000636463.english: I believe a force of around 40 is appropriate.

1000636464.english: Agreed. It would be best to deploy 40 elite operatives using a transport with special stealth modifications.
1000636464.korean: 동의합니다. 특수 차폐 처리를 한 수송기로 40명의 최정예 대원을 투입하는 것이 좋겠습니다.

1000636465.english: You must also consider the safety of the Orca, where Your Excellency is.
1000636465.korean: 각하가 계신 오르카 호의 안전도 생각하셔야 합니다.

1000636466.english: I think the same. If all 40 elite troops are deployed at once, your own safety could also be at risk.
1000636466.korean: 소관도 같은 생각이오. 최정예 병력 40이 동시에 빠져나간다면, 그대의 안위 또한 위험하오.

1000636469.english: —As always, Mari and Yong did not withhold timely tactical advice.
1000636469.korean: - 언제나처럼 마리와 용은 내게 시의적절한 전술적 조언을 아끼지 않았다.

1000636470.english: —And on the Orca, there are many other excellent fighters just as capable as the two of them.
1000636470.korean: - 그리고 오르카에는 이 둘만큼이나 훌륭한 전투원들이 많이 있다.

1000636471.english: —I fell into thought as I saw the faces of the operatives appearing on the command and control system.
1000636471.korean: - 나는 지휘 통제 시스템에 떠오르는 대원들의 얼굴을 보며 생각에 잠겼다.

1000636472.english: Everyone, it will take about four hours to reach the target. Depending on the Commander's judgment, it may vary, but we expect to complete exploration and return within an hour after arrival.
1000636472.korean: 여러분, 목표 지점 도달까지 약 네 시간이 걸릴 겁니다. 사령관님의 판단에 따라 달라질 수도 있지만, 도착 후 탐색 및 귀환까지 한 시간 내로 예상하고 있어요.

1000636473.english: Then, I wish everyone good luck. Let's board now!
1000636473.korean: 그럼, 다들 무운을 빕니다. 이제 탑승하도록 해요!

1000636474.english: Let's check personnel: one, two, three, four…
1000636474.korean: 인원 확인할게. 하나, 둘, 셋, 넷...

1000636475.english: —The operatives boarded the transport one by one. In the brightly lit hangar, all participants of this operation gathered under Labiata's instructions.
1000636475.korean: - 차례로 수송기에 올라타는 전투원들. 환하게 불이 밝혀진 격납고에는 이번 작전에 참여하는 대원들이 라비아타의 지시에 따라 모여있다.

1000636476.english: —One of them silently noticed my presence.
1000636476.korean: - 그들 중 한 명이, 말 없이 방문한 나의 존재를 알아차렸다.

1000636478.english: "Master? You didn't have to come out yourself…"

1000636479.english: —It's been a while since such a high-risk operation. No matter what, sitting quietly on the bridge would make me uneasy.
1000636479.korean: - 이처럼 위험도가 큰 작전은 오랜만이다. 아무리 그래도 함교에 가만히 앉아있기에는 신경이 쓰일 수밖에.

1000636480.english: "Don't worry. There won't be any stragglers, just like before."

1000636481.english: "Yes, that's right. Under your command, Master, certainly."

1000636482.english: —From their eyes, I could feel deep trust. To live up to that trust, I need to stay fully alert.
1000636482.korean: - 둘의 눈빛에서 깊은 신뢰가 느껴진다. 그 마음에 응하기 위해선 나도 정신을 똑바로 차려야겠지.

1000636483.english: "Labiata, Constantia! Now it's just the two of us left!"

1000636484.english: "Ah, human? Did you come to see us off? We have to depart now, so hurry back!"
1000636484.korean: 앗, 인간? 우릴 배웅해주러 온거야? 이제 출발해야되니까, 얼른 돌아가!

1000636486.korean: 코, 콘스탄챠, 어서 가자 다들 기다리고 있다니까?

1000636490.english: Even a single word like this could give the troops strength…
1000636490.korean: - 이런 말 한마디라도 대원들에게 힘이 될 수 있다면...

1000636494.english: There are still no anomalies at the landing site, Commander.
1000636494.korean: 착륙 예정지에는 여전히 특이사항이 없습니다, 주인님.

1000636496.english: After a brief delay, Orangeade's face appeared on the large screen. Behind her stood an unusually tall tower—our target.
1000636496.korean: - 짧은 지연시간 후, 넓은 화면에 오렌지에이드의 얼굴이 떠올랐다. 그 뒤에 보이는 기이할 정도로 높은 탑. 우리의 목표 지점이다.

1000636497.english: Orangeade, any issues? But if you're coming here, could we manage some supplies? There's literally nothing here!
1000636497.korean: 오렌지에이드, 이상 없습니다! 근데 오시게 되면 저, 보급 좀 어떻게 안될까요? 여기엔 정말 아무것도 없다구요!

1000636498.english: I only have a few days' worth of cosmetics left—

1000636499.english: We will designate Orangeade's base as a temporary relay station. Please proceed with the setup for signal retransmission.
1000636499.korean: 현재 오렌지에이드 양의 거점을 임시 중계소로 지정하겠습니다. 신호 재전송을 위한 설정을 진행해주세요.

1000636501.english: Since the inside of the tower is likely a shadow zone, we need to expand the communication cell coverage.
1000636501.korean: 아무래도 탑 내부는 음영지역일테니까, 통신 셀 커버리지를 확대해야해요.

1000636502.english: Hey~ who am I talking to~?

1000636503.english: Commander, the communication setup with the command unit will be completed soon. Please wait a little.
1000636503.korean: 주인님, 곧 지휘 유닛과 통신 설정이 완료될거예요. 조금만 기다려주세요.

1000636505.english: Once Orangeade finishes her work, it will connect to the ultra-horizon broadband communication system prepared by Dr. Yang.
1000636505.korean: 오렌지에이드 양의 작업이 끝나면, 닥터 양이 준비해둔 초수평선 광대역 통신시스템과 연결될거예요.

1000636506.english: Then, Commander, you will have an environment where you can monitor the operation in real-time and simultaneously command and control all 40 combatants.
1000636506.korean: 그러면 주인님께선 작전 상황을 실시간으로 확인하며 40명의 전투원들을 동시에 지휘, 통제할 수 있는 환경이 구축돼요.

1000636508.english: Yes, yes~ I'll finish it up quickly~

1000636509.english: At that moment, another communication came through.

1000636510.english: Commander, this is Constantia. We're about to reach the landing site.
1000636510.korean: 주인님, 콘스탄챠입니다. 곧 착륙 지점에 도착해요.

1000636513.english: Landing in 3 minutes! Landing in 3 minutes!

1000636514.english: There's a lot of static, but I'll keep the channel open.

1000636515.english: Ah, I can see the tower!

1000636516.english: Constantia gasped, apparently surprised by the size of the tower.
1000636516.korean: - 탑의 크기를 보고 놀랐는지, 콘스탄챠가 숨을 삼켰다.

1000636517.english: Descent begins! Left side clear, right side clear!
1000636517.korean: 하강 시작! 좌측 이상 무, 우측 이상 무!

1000636521.english: Everyone, stay calm and report the situation!

1000636523.english: After Constantia's shout, communication was instantly cut off.
1000636523.korean: - 콘스탄챠의 외침을 끝으로 통신은 순식간에 끊겨버렸다.

1000636524.english: Despite my calls, the severed connection showed no sign of recovery.
1000636524.korean: - 내 부름에도 끊긴 통신은 복구될 기미가 없다.

1000636526.english: The transport stopped midair! …just like that!

1000636528.english: Wait a moment. Signals are coming in! Multiple at once!
1000636528.korean: 자, 잠시만요. 신호가 들어오고 있어요! 동시에, 여러개가요!

1000636529.english: Commander, during relay setup, the connection to the transport was lost, so not all channels can be connected.
1000636529.korean: 주인님, 중계 설정 도중에 수송선과 연결이 끊겨서 전부 연결할 수가 없어요.

1000636531.english: Orangeade, try to restore the relay channels as quickly as possible!
1000636531.korean: 오렌지에이드는 최대한 빨리 중계 채널 복구를 시도해보도록 하세요!

1000636532.english: Everyone, gather! We're leaving this area!

1000636534.english: Understood. Commander, retreat preparations are complete.

1000636536.english: The transports, partially buried in the eroded tower walls, broke the weakened joints and gradually lifted off in sequence.
1000636536.korean: - 침식되어 탑의 외벽에 반쯤 파묻혀있던 수송기들이 약해진 접합부를 부수며 차례로 떠올랐다.

1000636537.english: Only after all the transports had cleared the tower could I finally exhale.
1000636537.korean: - 모든 수송기가 탑에서 벗어난 뒤에야 나는 한숨을 돌릴 수 있었다.

1000636538.english: It was an extremely arduous ordeal.

1000636539.english: So-kwan merely assisted you. More importantly…

1000636540.english: The tower's true nature remains a mystery. It's fortunate there was no major damage, but what kind of phenomenon could this be…
1000636540.korean: 여전히 탑의 정체는 수수께끼요. 큰 피해가 없어서 다행이지만, 대체 무슨 조화인지…

1000636541.english: I just received Dr. Yang's assessment of the tower.
1000636541.korean: 마침 탑에 대한 닥터 양의 소견을 전달받았습니다.

1000636542.english: Apparently, some sort of localized spatial interference is occurring due to a certain type of energy.
1000636542.korean: 아무래도 모종의 에너지에 의해 국지적인 공간 간섭이 이루어지는 것 같다고 하는군요.

1000636543.english: That must be why the city and transports disappeared and became assimilated into the tower.
1000636543.korean: 그것 때문에 도시와 수송기가 사라지고, 탑에 침식되었겠죠.

1000636544.english: While the emergence of such things in unknown space is a technique of the Metal Parasites, we haven't seen it even once since the initial airstrike.
1000636544.korean: 미지의 공간에서 나타는 것이 철충의 기술이긴 하지만, 최초의 공습 후에는 한 번도 볼 수 없었소.

1000636545.english: I fear this might be the seed of a new calamity… a very serious concern.
1000636545.korean: 혹여나 이것이 새로운 재액의 씨앗이 아닐지… 심히 우려되오.

1000636546.english: I agree. It could yield results beyond our imagination. We can't just stand by idly.
1000636546.korean: 동의해요. 어쩌면 저희의 상상을 뛰어넘는 결과를 가져올지도 모르죠. 마냥 방관할 수만은 없다고 생각해요.

1000636547.english: Even now, our information on the Metal Parasites is insufficient. This experience made that painfully clear.
1000636547.korean: - 여전히 우리는 철충에 대한 정보가 부족하다. 이번 경험을 통해 그 사실을 피부로 느낄 수 있었다.

1000636548.english: Is it right to just hide and wait until something happens? Or is it right to risk danger in order to study them?
1000636548.korean: - 가만히 숨어서 무언가 일이 벌어질 때까지 기다리는 것이 옳은가? 아니면 위험부담을 감수하더라도 그들을 탐구하는 것이 옳은 일인가?

1000636549.english: Ultimately, the decision rests with me. The lives and future of those I hold dear hinge on a single word from me.
1000636549.korean: - 결국 결정을 내리는 것은 나 자신이다. 소중한 이들의 생명과 미래가 전부 내 말 한마디에 달려있다.

1000636550.english: In search of that answer, I fell into deep contemplation…
1000636550.korean: - 그 해답을 찾고자, 나는 깊은 고민에 빠졌다…

1000636553.english: We can fix things gradually. But more importantly, what's going on?
1000636553.korean: 차차 고치면 되겠지. 그보다 무슨 일이야?

1000636557.english: This is… the one we saw before.

1000636563.english: It must be the work of the Metal Parasites.

1000636565.english: I plan to explore that tower.

1000636566.english: What if we deploy all forces?

1000636569.english: Still, that's too few. A little more—

1000636574.english: That… Orangeade has been through a lot.

1000636577.english: Damn… Orangeade, can you confirm the situation?
1000636577.korean: 제길... 오렌지에이드, 상황 확인할 수 있어?

1000636590.english: Walking down the familiar corridors of the Orca.

1000636591.english: I greeted the troops, each with their own unique personality, and then, suddenly, I turned my head to look back.
1000636591.korean: - 각양각색 개성적으로 인사하는 대원들에게 마주 인사하다 문득, 고개를 돌려 뒤를 보았다.

1000636592.english: Even inside the Orca, neither outside nor in a battlefield, the head of security scanned the passing troops and the corridor with sharp eyes.
1000636592.korean: - 적지도, 야외도 아닌 오르카 호 내부인데도 경호대장님은 날카로운 눈초리로 지나가는 대원들과 복도 이곳저곳을 확인하고 있다.

1000636593.english: Yes, Master. Do you have something for the good Lilith to do?
1000636593.korean: 네, 주인님. 착한 리리스에게 시키실 것이 있으신가요?

1000636594.english: But the moment our eyes met, Lilith's face softened into a melting smile.
1000636594.korean: - 하지만 눈이 마주친 순간, 리리스의 얼굴이 풀어지며 녹아내릴듯한 미소를 짓는다.

1000636595.english: When I stopped walking, Lilith also paused and looked at me.
1000636595.korean: - 내가 걸음을 멈추자 리리스도 제자리에 서서 나를 바라본다.

1000636596.english: Directly behind my right side, about one and a half steps away.
1000636596.korean: - 내 오른쪽 뒤, 정확히 한 걸음 반정도 되는 거리에서.

1000636598.english: As I took a step forward, Lilith stepped back. The distance between us remained one and a half steps. Lilith opened her mouth as if to admonish.
1000636598.korean: - 내가 한 걸음 다가가자, 리리스도 한 걸음 물러난다. 여전히 우리 둘 사이의 거리는 한 걸음 반. 리리스는 타이르듯이 입을 열었다.

1000636599.english: Hehe, Master. Miss Gremlin will be waiting. You should go quickly.
1000636599.korean: 후후, 주인님. 그렘린 양이 기다리고 있을 거예요. 어서 가시는 게 좋겠어요.

1000636600.english: As I turned and resumed walking, Lilith's footsteps followed from one and a half steps behind.
1000636600.korean: - 몸을 돌려 다시 걸음을 옮기자 한 걸음 반 뒤에서 리리스의 발소리가 나를 따라왔다.

1000636604.english: Master, then I'll go prepare as well.

1000636606.english: Lilith headed toward the Companion troops gathered over there. The Black Wyrm, who had been waiting in shifts, approached my side.
1000636606.korean: - 리리스는 저쪽에 모여있던 컴패니언 대원들에게 향했다. 그와 교대로 미리 대기하고 있던 블랙 웜이 내 옆으로 다가왔다.

1000636607.english: Master, all the Companions are running the simulation.
1000636607.korean: 주인님, 컴패니언 분들이 전원 시뮬레이션을 진행합니다.

1000636608.english: It's not an actual combat situation, but I'll temporarily take on your escort.
1000636608.korean: 전투 상황은 아니지만, 임시로 제가 주인님의 호위를 맡겠습니다.

1000636609.english: Ah, a message just came through.

1000636611.english: ……! As expected, even the Commander loves machines…!

1000636612.english: Recently, the San'an combat simulation management robot, which we established a cooperative relationship with, requested to run simulations for the Companion troops.
1000636612.korean: - 얼마전, 우리와 협력 관계를 구축한 삼안의 전투 시뮬레이션 관리 로봇이 컴패니언 대원들의 시뮬레이션을 진행해달라는 요청을 해왔다.

1000636614.english: Yes. The restoration is complete, and they're sending the simulation data now.
1000636614.korean: 네. 복구가 끝나서 지금 시뮬레이션 데이터를 전송하고 있대요.

1000636617.english: Based on the data analyzed so far, our troops are showing combat methods and performance very different from previous models of the same type.
1000636617.korean: 지금까지 분석한 데이터상, 저희 대원들은 과거의 같은 기종들과 굉장히 다른 전투 방식과 퍼포먼스를 보인대요.

1000636619.english: With Snow Feather and Poi joining this time, we should get good data.
1000636619.korean: 이번에 스노우 페더 양과 포이 양도 합류했으니까, 좋은 데이터를 얻을 수 있을 것 같다네요.

1000636621.english: Once ready, the Companion troops, under Lilith's command, entered the training room.
1000636621.korean: - 준비가 끝났는지 컴패니언 대원들이 리리스의 통솔 하에 훈련실 안으로 들어섰다.

1000636623.english: "…‘5th Companion Escort Simulation Result: 78 points. Score insufficient. Failed!'"
1000636623.korean: ..."제 5차 컴패니언 호위 시뮬레이션 결과 78점. 점수 미달. 탈락!"

1000636625.english: Even after that, the training continued…

1000636628.english: For some reason, the failures keep repeating.

1000636629.english: I'm sorry, Lilith… it's because of me…

1000636630.english: No, Perrault. As the one in command, it's my responsibility. Let's try again with strength.
1000636630.korean: 아니야, 페로. 지휘를 맡은 내 책임이야. 힘내서 다시 해보자.

1000636631.english: Yes. This time we'll definitely pass.
1000636631.korean: 네. 이번엔 분명 통과할 수 있을 거예요.

1000636634.english: Do we have to do it again? I'm hungry…

1000636636.english: I-I'm fine. Besides, it's my first time escorting alongside the older sisters like this… um…
1000636636.korean: 저, 저는 괜찮아요. 거기다 이렇게 언니들과 함께 호위하는 건 처음이라... 그...

1000636639.english: It really was a shame this time…

1000636640.english: But what on earth is the reason? I don't see any particular problem…
1000636640.korean: 그런데 대체 이유가 뭘까요? 별다른 문제점은 보이지 않는데...

1000636641.english: The Companions struggled to protect the virtual me, and their efforts were no different from when they normally face the Metal Parasites.
1000636641.korean: - 컴패니언은 가상의 나를 지키기 위해 고군분투했고, 그 모습은 평소 철충들을 상대하는 그녀들과 다르지 않았다.

1000636642.english: Yet already several times they've fallen below standard. What could the problem be?
1000636642.korean: - 그럼에도 벌써 몇번이나 기준 미달. 대체 뭐가 문제지?

1000636645.english: It would have been a little disappointing if the results were exactly the same as the records, but they're glad there were varied outcomes.
1000636645.korean: 기록과 똑같은 결과가 나왔으면 조금 실망했을 텐데, 다양한 결과가 나와서 다행이래요.

1000636646.english: In the past, the Companions had to pass this simulation to earn the right to have their master.
1000636646.korean: - 과거, 컴패니언들은 분명 저 시뮬레이션을 통과해야 주인을 가질 자격을 얻게 된다고 되어있다.

1000636647.english: Of course, Poi, who isn't in the simulation records, was added, but that doesn't seem to be the problem…
1000636647.korean: - 물론 시뮬레이션 기록에는 없는 포이가 추가됐지만, 그게 문제인 것 같지는 않은데...

1000636648.english: The Companion troops are already accustomed to protecting me.
1000636648.korean: - 컴패니언 대원들은 이미 나를 지키는데에 익숙해져있다.

1000636649.english: Even though there's a virtual me, I wasn't inputting my behavior patterns—they were just standing there blankly.
1000636649.korean: - 아무리 가상의 내가 있다고는 하지만, 내 행동방식을 입력한 것도 아니라 그저 멍하니 서있을 뿐이다.

1000636652.english: Even though it's a virtual training, you could get hurt. Right, Gremlin?
1000636652.korean: 아무리 가상훈련이지만 주인님께서 다치실 수도 있어요. 그렇죠, 그렘린 양?

1000636653.english: Hmm, in a normal virtual reality it could be dangerous…
1000636653.korean: 흐음, 일반적인 가상 현실이라면 위험할 수도 있겠지만...

1000636654.english: But our facility has five layers of safety devices under the Commander's orders, so it's not a big problem—
1000636654.korean: 저희 시설은 사령관님 명령으로 안전장치가 다섯 겹이나 있어서 큰 문제는-

1000636657.english: Th-This could be a big problem… or maybe not… Ahaha…
1000636657.korean: 크, 큰 문제가 발생할... 수도 있고, 아닐수도 있고... 아하하...

1000636658.english: …Haah. How could I ever go against the Master's will.

1000636659.english: Understood, Master. Even if it's just training, I will definitely protect you.
1000636659.korean: 알겠어요, 주인님. 비록 훈련이지만 반드시 주인님을 지켜내겠어요.

1000636661.english: Entering the training room with Lilith, the other Companions welcomed us.
1000636661.korean: - 리리스와 함께 훈련실 안으로 들어가자 다른 컴패니언들이 맞아주었다.

1000636662.english: Hehe, this time I really get to protect the Master!
1000636662.korean: 헤헤, 이번엔 진짜로 주인님을 지키게 됐어요!

1000636663.english: Hachiko, watch the front properly. I'll cover the rear, Master.
1000636663.korean: 하치코, 제대로 앞을 봐. 뒤는 제게 맡겨주세요, 주인님.

1000636665.english: Sticking close to the Master, blocking everything— Nyaaah?!
1000636665.korean: 주인님이랑 꼬옥 달라붙어서, 전부 막아- 냐앗?!

1000636666.english: Don't joke around. Even if it's training, the Master came in personally.
1000636666.korean: 장난치지 마. 아무리 훈련이라고 해도 주인님께서 직접 들어오셨어.

1000636668.english: Poi, continue as before, disturb the enemies at the front alongside Fenrir.
1000636668.korean: 포이는 하던대로 펜리르랑 같이 전방에서 적을 교란하도록 해.

1000636673.english: Lilith approached me with a slight smile and, along with Snow Feather, took position diagonally in front of me.
1000636673.korean: - 살풋 웃으며 내게 다가오는 리리스는 스노우 페더와 함께 내 대각선 앞에 자리잡았다.

1000636674.english: Still, at about a step and a half away.
1000636674.korean: - 여전히, 한 걸음 반 정도 떨어진 곳에서.

1000636677.english: …Yes. "6th Companion Escort Simulation Result: 58 points. Score insufficient. Failed." it says…
1000636677.korean: ...네. "제 6차 컴패니언 호위 시뮬레이션 결과 58점. 점수 미달. 탈락." 이라고...

1000636679.english: I emerged unscathed without a singe on my collar, but the Companions suffered more than in previous training.
1000636679.korean: - 나는 옷깃 하나 그슬리지 않고 무사했지만, 이전의 훈련 때보다 컴패니언들의 피해가 더 커졌다.

1000636680.english: Ugh… I couldn't go all out because I was worried about the rear.
1000636680.korean: 으으... 뒤쪽이 신경쓰여서 제대로 못 날뛰었어.

1000636683.english: Not entirely certain, but it seemed Lilith was maintaining close protection while still keeping a certain distance from me.
1000636683.korean: - 확실하지는 않지만... 리리스는 날 밀착경호하면서도, 내게 일정 거리 이상 다가오려하지 않는 것 같았다.

1000636684.english: The virtual assassins relentlessly targeted that gap, and Snow Feather and Perrault struggled to fill it, causing the formation to falter.
1000636684.korean: - 가상의 암살자들은 집요하게 그 빈틈을 노렸고, 스노우 페더와 페로가 그 빈틈을 메꾸느라 진형이 흐트러졌다.

1000636685.english: To cover that gap, Fenrir and Poi at the front couldn't properly attend to the rear, and Hachiko, receiving concentrated attacks in the meantime, wavered—creating another gap in a vicious cycle.
1000636685.korean: - 그리고 그 빈틈을 메꾸기 위해 전방의 펜리르와 포이가 후방을 신경쓰느라 견제를 제대로 못 하고, 그 사이 집중 공격을 받은 하치코가 흔들려 다시 빈틈이 생기는 악순환이 벌어졌다.

1000636689.english: They say time is needed to organize and analyze the data.
1000636689.korean: 데이터를 정리하고 분석할 시간이 필요하다고 하네요.

1000636691.english: Lilith, who had been biting her lip in frustration, soon slumped her shoulders.
1000636691.korean: - 분한듯 입술을 깨물던 리리스가 이내 어깨를 축 늘어뜨렸다.

1000636693.english: Today, Master's escort… please leave it to Black Wyrm.
1000636693.korean: 오늘 주인님의 호위는... 그대로 블랙 웜 양이 맡아주세요.

1000636694.english: As Black Wyrm, quietly standing behind me, nodded, Lilith bowed slightly and left the training room.
1000636694.korean: - 조용히 내 뒤에 서있던 블랙 웜이 고개를 끄덕이자, 리리스는 꾸벅 고개를 숙이곤 훈련실 밖으로 나갔다.

1000636696.english: …Lilith-Big Sis, has something troubling happened recently?
1000636696.korean: ...리리스 언니, 요새 안 좋은 일이라도 있는 걸까요?

1000636697.english: It seemed like you couldn't concentrate for quite some time now.
1000636697.korean: 아까부터 쭉... 집중을 못 하시는 것 같았어요.

1000636699.english: Hmm... seems to be very conscious of the master...

1000636700.english: I can see it because I'm in the same position as Sister Lilith. Blocking bullets with a shield, dealing with invading assassins, all while constantly keeping an eye on Master...
1000636700.korean: 저는 리리스 언니랑 같은 포지션이니까 보이거든요. 방패로 탄환을 막아내고, 돌입하는 암살자를 처리하면서도 끊임없이 주인님을 살피고...

1000636702.english: I will go and talk to them.

1000636703.english: What? Master, this is an important matter.

1000636704.english: If something goes wrong with my older sister, who is in charge of the escort, it is directly related to the Master's safety-
1000636704.korean: 호위 책임자인 언니에게 문제가 생기는 건, 주인님의 안위에 직결되는-

1000636706.english: I could see the worry and affection for my sister in Ferro as she hurriedly tried to persuade me.
1000636706.korean: - 다급하게 날 설득하는 페로에게서 언니에 대한 걱정과 애정이 묻어났다.

1000636708.english: It goes without saying, but if I had to name the members I spend the most time with, it would naturally be my companions.
1000636708.korean: - 새삼스럽지만, 나와 가장 오랜 시간을 붙어 있는 대원들을 꼽는다면 당연 컴패니언들이다.

1000636709.english: Except for sleeping time, at least one companion always takes turns staying by my side, whether I am traveling, eating, or working.
1000636709.korean: - 자는 시간을 제외하면, 이동할때든, 식사할때든, 업무를 볼 때든 항상 최소 한 명의 컴패니언이 교대로 내 곁을 지킨다.

1000636710.english: have become so accustomed to and comfortable with it now that I sometimes forget it is right beside me, but there is one thing I have realized recently.
1000636710.korean: - 이제는 너무 익숙해지고 편해져서 가끔씩 옆에 있다는 사실도 잊을 정도지만, 최근들어 깨달은 점이 하나 있다.

1000636711.english: Curious and lively Hachiko is completely absorbed in looking around and sniffing everywhere even when walking with me.
1000636711.korean: - 호기심이 많고 발랄한 하치코는 나와 걸을 때도 이곳저곳 둘러보고 냄새를 맡느라 정신이 없다.

1000636712.english: However, even so, it is commendable that the shield is in a position to protect me at any time.
1000636712.korean: - 하지만 그러면서도 방패는 언제든 나를 보호할 수 있는 위치에 있는 점이 기특하다.

1000636713.english: - Perrault always follows behind me with his hands politely clasped.
1000636713.korean: - 페로는 언제나 두 손을 공손히 모은채로 내 뒤를 따라온다.

1000636714.english: With that posture and his eyes cast down, he appears at first glance to have no interest in security, but his constantly twitching ears and stiffly standing tail reveal that he is on high alert.
1000636714.korean: - 그런 자세와 지긋이 내리깐 눈 때문에 일견 경호에 관심이 없어보이지만, 쉴새없이 쫑긋대는 귀와 꼿꼿히 서 있는 꼬리를 보면 신경을 곤두세우고 있다는 것을 알 수 있다.

1000636715.english: Meanwhile, unlike the quiet Perrault, Fenrir often charges forward as he pleases.
1000636715.korean: - 그런한편, 얌전한 페로와 달리 펜리르는 자기 멋대로 척척 앞으로 나가곤 한다.

1000636716.english: Since he has the best reflexes and agility among the companions, it’s probably an expression of his confidence that he can react to whatever happens... but it is also true that he gets scolded by Lilith every now and then because of that.
1000636716.korean: - 컴패니언 중에 순발력과 민첩성이 가장 뛰어나니까 무슨 일이 일어나더라도 반응할 수 있다는 자신감의 표현이겠지만... 그것 때문에 리리스한테 한 번씩 혼나는 것도 사실이다.

1000636717.english: Snow Feather has been living a life far removed from security for a long time, so she is currently in the process of adjusting.
1000636717.korean: - 스노우 페더는 오랜 시간 경호와는 거리가 먼 생활을 해왔기에 한창 적응 중이다.

1000636718.english: Perhaps because I was too nervous, my reaction was slow when I changed direction or stopped, so there were times when the wings touched me, but I am gradually getting better.
1000636718.korean: - 너무 긴장한 탓인지 내가 방향을 바꾸거나, 멈춰설 때 반응이 늦어 날개가 내게 닿는 일이 가끔 있었지만 차차 나아지고 있다.

1000636720.english: - Poi puts the words "close protection" into action.
1000636720.korean: - 포이는 밀착 경호라는 단어를 그대로 행동으로 옮긴다.

1000636721.english: To be precise, she links arms with me, clings to me tightly, and acts coquettishly without resting for a single moment.
1000636721.korean: - 정확히는 내게 팔짱을 끼곤 딱 달라붙어 한시도 쉬지 않고 교태를 부린다.

1000636722.english: I guess I should be glad to have recently realized that even when he gropes my body and whispers sleazy words in my ear, he doesn't let his guard down... Well, I guess that's why Lilith doesn't say much about it.
1000636722.korean: - 최근에 내 몸을 더듬으며 귓가에 끈적한 말을 속삭일 때에도 주변 경계는 게을리하지 않는다는 사실을 알게된 걸 다행이라고 해야하나... 뭐, 그래서 리리스도 별 말 안하는 거겠지.

1000636723.english: Because I don't want to have the embarrassing experience of jumping up in the middle of the hallway again...
1000636723.korean: - 또 꼴사납게 복도 한가운데에서 펄쩍 뛰는 경험은 하고 싶지 않으니까...

1000636725.english: Lilith always guards me from a diagonal position about a step and a half behind, neither too far nor too close.
1000636725.korean: - 리리스는 항상, 멀지도 가깝지도 않은 한 발자국 반 정도 뒤의 대각선 방향에서 나를 경호한다.

1000636726.english: Looking back, even though I always craved affection and acted as if I would embrace you at any moment, the distance between us never narrowed.
1000636726.korean: - 돌이켜보면 항상 애정을 갈구하며 당장이라도 안겨들 것처럼 굴면서도, 그 거리가 줄어드는 경우는 없었다.

1000636727.english: Following the scent of Lilith's perfume, which I had become accustomed to, I arrived in front of the captain's quarters door.
1000636727.korean: - 이제는 익숙해진 리리스의 향수 냄새를 따라오자 함장실 문 앞에 도착했다.

1000636731.english: Lilith carefully folded my blanket, which she had been holding tightly in her arms, and headed toward the door.
1000636731.korean: - 리리스는 품에 꼭 껴안고 있던 내 이불을 조심스럽게 갠 뒤 문으로 향했다.

1000636733.english: I slowly approached Lilith, who had her head bowed low. One and a half steps. As I stopped at our usual distance, Lilith cautiously lifted her head.
1000636733.korean: - 푹 고개를 숙인 리리스에게 천천히 다가갔다. 한 걸음 반. 평소의 거리에 멈춰서자 리리스가 조심스레 고개를 들었다.

1000636735.english: ...It is absolutely not that Lilith dislikes or avoids you, Master. Please believe me.
1000636735.korean: ...절대로 리리스가 주인님을 싫어한다거나, 꺼리는 건 아니에요. 믿어주세요.

1000636736.english: Lilith, who had been hesitating for a while at my words, cautiously opened her mouth.
1000636736.korean: - 내 말에 한동안 망설이던 리리스가 조심스레 입을 열었다.

1000636738.english: I want to run to my master, hug him, and be loved, just like my younger siblings and everyone else.
1000636738.korean: 동생들처럼, 다른 분들처럼 주인님께 달려가 안기고 사랑받고 싶어요.

1000636739.english: Because I like you so much, I love you so much... whether my eyes are open or closed, I can think of nothing but you...
1000636739.korean: 주인님이 정말 미치도록 좋아서, 사랑해서... 눈을 뜨든 감든 주인님 생각밖에 나지 않아서...
