1000636741.english: Master... I, Lilith... am not a good child.
1000636741.korean: 주인님... 저는, 리리스는... 착한 아이가 아니에요.

1000636742.english: I'm trying hard to hide it, but I'm extremely jealous, and I feel the urge to resort to violence at the slightest provocation...
1000636742.korean: 숨기려고 애쓰고 있지만 질투도 심하고, 툭하면 폭력을 쓰고 싶어지고...

1000636743.english: If this feeling deepens further, someday you will end up harming someone else who approaches you, Master.
1000636743.korean: 이 마음이 더욱 깊어져 간다면, 언젠가 주인님께 다가오는 다른 분에게 해를 입히고 말 거예요.

1000636744.english: Then, the relationship Lilith has built with the Master so far will crumble in an instant. The Master... will get tired of the bad Lilith and start keeping their distance.
1000636744.korean: 그러면 지금까지 리리스가 주인님과 쌓아온 관계는 단번에 무너지겠죠. 주인님께선... 나쁜 리리스에게 싫증나시고, 거리를 두게 될 거예요.

1000636745.english: If it's going to turn out that way... I'd rather stay this way.
1000636745.korean: 그렇게 될 바엔... 차라리 이대로가 나아요.

1000636746.english: Lilith turned her head, wiped away her tears, and forced a smile.
1000636746.korean: - 고개를 돌리고 눈물을 닦은 리리스가 애써 웃음을 지었다.

1000636747.english: Master, I'm sorry. I will definitely get a passing score in tomorrow's training—
1000636747.korean: 주인님, 죄송해요. 내일 훈련에선 반드시 합격 점수를 받을테니까-

1000636750.english: He grabbed the flustered Lilith's wrist and pulled her into his arms.
1000636750.korean: - 당황하는 리리스의 손목을 잡아당겨 품에 안았다.

1000636756.english: At my words, Lilith's body, held in my arms, began to tremble.
1000636756.korean: - 내 말에 품에 안긴 리리스의 몸이 떨리기 시작했다.

1000636762.english: Lilith wrapped her arms around my waist and hugged me tightly, as if we were becoming one body.
1000636762.korean: - 리리스는 내 허리에 팔을 감으며, 한 몸이 될 것처럼 꼭 안겨왔다.

1000636763.english: I've wanted to do this for a long time... ever since we first met, all the way...
1000636763.korean: 전부터 계속... 이렇게 하고 싶었어요... 처음 만났을 때부터, 주욱...

1000636764.english: You're being mean. How could Lilith ever forget that day?
1000636764.korean: 짓궂으세요. 리리스가 어떻게 그 날을 잊겠어요?

1000636765.english: From the time and place where she first met her Master, to her emotions, and even everything around her... Lilith has never forgotten him for a single moment.
1000636765.korean: 처음으로 주인님을 만난 시간, 장소, 감정, 주변에 있던 모든 것들까지... 리리스는 한순간도 잊어본 적이 없어요.

1000636766.english: Hehe, it was the day I showed my master my swimsuit for the first time.
1000636766.korean: 후후, 주인님께 처음으로 수영복을 보여드린 날이었죠.

1000636767.english: I was really happy that you said it suited me.

1000636768.english: I gave you a chocolate shaped like me.

1000636769.english: Lilith was also really happy because her master was pleased.

1000636770.english: As they shared their memories in a low voice, Lilith's trembling subsided.
1000636770.korean: - 나지막하게 추억을 공유할수록, 리리스의 떨림은 잦아들었다.

1000636772.english: As I tidied Lilith's bangs while she gazed at me with wet eyes, a bright smile returned.
1000636772.korean: - 젖은 눈으로 바라보는 리리스의 앞머리를 정리해주자, 환한 미소가 돌아왔다.

1000636774.english: Lilith is... Master's only good Lilith.

1000636778.english: Oh, no. I'll tell you next time. Tomorrow, after I successfully complete the training.
1000636778.korean: 아, 아니에요. 다음에 말씀드릴게요. 내일, 훈련을 성공적으로 마친 뒤에요.

1000636779.english: Lilith, who had slowly moved away from me, bowed her head politely.
1000636779.korean: - 천천히 내게서 떨어진 리리스가 공손하게 머리를 숙였다.

1000636780.english: I will leave the escort to Miss Black Worm today as planned.
1000636780.korean: 오늘 호위는 예정대로 블랙 웜 양에게 맡기겠습니다.

1000636782.english: Lilith smiled faintly and turned away, her footsteps looking lighter than ever.
1000636782.korean: - 작게 웃어보이고 돌아서는 리리스의 발걸음은 그 어느때보다 가벼워보였다.

1000636783.english: - The next day, we ran the simulation once again.
1000636783.korean: - 다음날, 우리는 다시 한 번 시뮬레이션을 진행했다.

1000636784.english: Lilith gave a brief instruction to her younger siblings and then approached me.
1000636784.korean: - 리리스는 동생들에게 간단히 지시를 내린뒤, 내게 다가왔다.

1000636786.english: As I took a step, Lilith soon caught up. The distance was... about half a step.
1000636786.korean: - 내가 걸음을 옮기자 리리스가 곧 따라붙었다. 거리는... 반 걸음 정도.

1000636787.english: H-H-It’s not good to stay too close when escorting, Master.
1000636787.korean: 호, 호위할 때 너무 붙어있는 건 좋지 않아요, 주인님.

1000636789.english: At Gremlin's words, I met Lilith's eyes.

1000636790.english: Lilith, wearing her usual melting smile, drew her twin pistols, the Black Mamba.
1000636790.korean: - 평소대로 녹아내리는 듯한 미소를 지은 리리스가 쌍권총, 블랙맘바를 뽑아들었다.

1000636795.english: Master, Master! I did well this time, right? Huh, huh?
1000636795.korean: 주인님, 주인님! 나 이번에 잘했지? 응, 응?

1000636800.english: Approaching me were the other three, while my left hand stroked Hachiko, right hand stroked Snow Feather, and Fenrir hung around my neck.
1000636800.korean: - 왼손은 하치코, 오른손은 스노우 페더를 쓰다듬으며, 목에는 펜리르를 매달고 있는 내게 다른 셋이 다가왔다.

1000636801.english: Nyahaha, Master's hands are so busy…
1000636801.korean: 냐하핫, 주인님의 양 손이 다 바쁘시니까...

1000636802.english: Poi will rub her face he-re~♡

1000636805.english: Poi doesn't mind doing it together~

1000636806.english: D-Don't act all cutesy for no reason.

1000636808.english: Poi is just copying what Perrault un-nie did flirtatiously on the Master last time—gek.
1000636808.korean: 포이는 저번에 주인님 위에서 교태부리던 페로 언.니.를 따라할 뿐이다냐- 켁.

1000636812.english: Perrault, answering matter-of-factly, leaned slightly on my shoulder with a prim expression.
1000636812.korean: - 사무적으로 대답한 페로는 새침한 표정으로 슬쩍 내 어깨에 기댔다.

1000636814.english: As Lilith, watching me laughing with my little ones hanging all over me, approached, the perceptive Perrault pulled away.
1000636814.korean: - 동생들을 온 몸에 주렁주렁 매단 나를 웃으며 지켜보던 리리스가 다가오자, 눈치 빠른 페로가 내게서 몸을 뗐다.

1000636815.english: Alright, let's head back to our rooms.

1000636816.english: Is it a party? An after-party!

1000636819.english: It's not really a party… but, I guess that's fine.

1000636820.english: Master, feedback on the simulation can be given later. Then…
1000636820.korean: 주인님, 시뮬레이션에 대한 피드백은 나중에 받도록 하겠습니다. 그럼...

1000636821.english: Perrault quickly left the training room with the other Companion members.
1000636821.korean: - 페로는 다른 컴패니언 대원들을 데리고 순식간에 훈련실을 빠져나갔다.

1000636822.english: With communication with JY-438 ended and Gremlin gone, leaving just the two of us, Lilith gave an awkward smile.
1000636822.korean: - JY-438과의 통신도 종료되고, 그렘린도 돌아가 둘만 남게 되자 리리스는 멋쩍은 웃음을 지었다.

1000636823.english: Hehe, they really took care of you. Truly little siblings so precious you could put them in your eyes without pain.
1000636823.korean: 후후, 배려받았네요. 정말 눈에 넣어도 아프지 않은 동생들이에요.

1000636825.english: Our eyes met, and without either of us thinking first, we clasped each other's hands.
1000636825.korean: - 눈이 마주친 우리는, 누가 먼저랄 것도 없이 서로의 손을 맞잡았다.

1000636826.english: Feeling the warmth from our interlaced fingers, we returned to the captain's office.
1000636826.korean: - 깍지 낀 손에서 전해져 오는 체온을 느끼며 함장실로 돌아왔다.

1000636827.english: As soon as we sat side by side on the bed, Lilith rested her head on my shoulder.
1000636827.korean: - 침대에 나란히 앉자마자 리리스는 내 어깨에 머리를 기댔다.

1000636829.english: No, just as I imagined, such a wonderful and warm hand.
1000636829.korean: 아뇨, 상상했던대로 아주 멋지고, 따뜻한 손이에요.

1000636830.english: After fidgeting with our intertwined hands for a while in fascination, Lilith spoke.
1000636830.korean: - 한동안 신기한듯 깍지낀 손을 만지작 거리던 리리스가 입을 열었다.

1000636832.english: An imagination where, because of an accident, she never gets separated from the 21st Squad… continues the mission, and ends up meeting you.
1000636832.korean: 사고로 인해 21스쿼드와 떨어지지 않고... 그대로 임무를 진행해서 주인님을 만나게 되는 상상요.

1000636833.english: If it had been Lilith, and not Constance or Gryphon, who found you…
1000636833.korean: 주인님을 발견한 게 콘스탄챠 양과 그리폰 양이 아니라 리리스였다면...

1000636834.english: Then… it could have been your first…
1000636834.korean: 그렇다면... 주인님의 처음이 될 수 있었을 텐데...

1000636835.english: Hehe, then… would it have been a little different from now?

1000636836.english: Hesitating briefly, Lilith spoke in a trembling voice.
1000636836.korean: - 잠시 망설이던 리리스가 떨리는 목소리로 입을 열었다.

1000636837.english: Master, the words I wanted to give you yesterday… may I give them now?
1000636837.korean: 주인님, 어제 드리려고 했던 말... 지금 드려도 될까요?

1000636838.english: I really… truly love you, Master.

1000636839.english: Even though Lilith couldn't be your first… please allow me to be Lilith' first.
1000636839.korean: 비록 리리스는 주인님의 처음이 되지는 못했지만... 리리스의 처음을... 부탁, 드려요.

1000636841.english: Yes! I'll get ready and come right away…!

1000636842.english: Before I could even respond, Lilith ran off.

1000636843.english: Her taste is a bit daring, but since she's happy that way… well…
1000636843.korean: - 리리스의 취향은 조금 위험하지만, 본인은 저렇게 좋아하니까, 뭐...

1000636846.english: The preparations for the party are done, so Hachiko came to call you…
1000636846.korean: 파티 준비 다 돼서 하치코, 언니 부르러 왔는데...

1000636848.english: Eh…? Unnie, why are you wearing that outfit…?
1000636848.korean: 엥...? 언니, 왜 그 옷 입고 있어요...?

1000636850.english: Unnie… I don't think I can make it to the party today…
1000636850.korean: 언니는... 오늘 파티에 못 갈 것 같아요...

1000636853.english: Lilith-Big Sis got caught by Master…!

1000636854.english: How can you just go calling her like that~

1000636855.english: But the meat pie is baked so deliciously…

1000636856.english: For Lilith-Big Sis, the meat pie isn't important right now~ Come on, quickly—
1000636856.korean: 리리스 언니한테는 지금 미트파이가 중요하지 않답니다~ 자, 어서-

1000636857.english: Ma-Master! Lilith is a naughty girl… haa… punish her more…
1000636857.korean: 쥬, 쥬인니힘ㅡ! 리리슈는 나쁜 아이니까하아... 더어... 더 혼내쥬세요오...

1000636862.english: Hng… such a sticky smell is coming out… I'm jealous…
1000636862.korean: 흐응... 엄~청 끈적한 냄새가 새어나오네... 부럽다...

1000636863.english: Well, since today's a historic day, maybe I'll refrain from barging in. Nyahah~
1000636863.korean: 뭐, 오늘은 역사적인 날이니까 쳐들어가는 건 참아볼까나. 냐하핫~

1000636866.english: I laid Lilith, who was leaning on me, down on the bed.

1000636867.english: Hehe, I never thought a day like this would come…

1000636868.english: Can you feel how happy Lilith is right now…?
